After finishing her orange soda, the little one wanted some milk tea. A tea lady brought over milk and sugar, pouring a cup of osmanthus oolong tea mixed with milk.

The little one took a sip, smacked her lips, but shook her head.

“It’s not as good as what my daddy made.”

The tea lady took a sip and thought it was fine, but the little one kept saying it wasn’t as good. It seemed that it wasn’t just a matter of mixing milk and sugar.

The tea ladies started sipping the osmanthus oolong tea Lu Qin had made again. This tea was just too fragrant. There weren’t many people in the tea area, and it seemed that the guests weren’t too fond of the tea ceremony today. This was perfect for the tea ladies, who could now enjoy the osmanthus oolong tea.

After a while, three elderly men walked into the tea area.

“Yao! Old Zhu, smell this! This tea’s fragrance is so inviting!”

“Mm, not bad, it’s top quality!”

“Looks like Ouyang Peng is too busy to greet us. Let’s sit down and have some tea.”

The tea ladies quickly stood up to serve them. The three elderly men noticed the little beauty and couldn’t help but look at her a few more times.

“Little one, do you like tea?”

“Grandpa, I like milk tea~!”

chapters.title: Chapter 181
chapters.content:
Chapter 181 “Grandpa, don’t you think eating so much salt is too salty?”

“Little one, you should drink less milk tea, it’s not good for your health,” the elderly man said earnestly.

This old man, named Zhu Guangyao, was an old friend of Ouyang Peng. He enjoyed fine food and tea.

“Not really! My dad says that milk tea from outside is bad because the milk and sugar are not good,” said the little girl, Lu Xiyao, as she sat obediently and explained logically.

“Oh?”

Zhu Guangyao raised his eyebrows. In his mind, sugar was something to avoid, and milk tea was certainly off-limits due to its negative effects on health.

Lu Xiyao continued, “The milk tea I drink is made by my dad, using fresh milk and good sugar.”

Zhu Guangyao became intrigued and turned to Lu Xiyao, asking, “Little one, what is good sugar?”

“My dad says natural sugars like cane sugar and malt sugar are good. Drinking cane sugar water can even make you lose weight and be healthier!” she said. “Cane sugar also protects your teeth from cavities!”

Zhu Guangyao shook his head, feeling that what she said was not quite right.

“Little one, your dad is mistaken. Sugar can’t protect your teeth!”

Several tea ceremony ladies and two other elderly people watched this conversation with interest. It was amusing to see an argument between the old man and the little girl. When the old man said her father was wrong, Lu Xiyao immediately became upset and raised her voice a bit.

“My dad is always right, Grandpa, you just don’t understand!” She said proudly.

“Heh, I don’t understand?” Zhu Guangyao chuckled. “I’ve eaten more salt than your dad has eaten meals!”

Listening to how the little girl kept saying “my dad says,” Zhu Guangyao felt that sometimes, young parents lead their children down the wrong path and needed to correct it promptly.

The tea ladies and the elderly men had never heard of sugar protecting teeth, and they were a bit confused by the child’s statements.

Lu Xiyao tilted her head in confusion.

“Grandpa, don’t you think eating so much salt isn’t salty?”

Everyone laughed at her innocent remark. Zhu Guangyao was stunned. This little girl was really too cute.

“What I mean is, I’ve seen and experienced much more than your dad. But children should eat less sugar, okay?”

“I only listen to my dad, not you! Hmph! ”

Lu Xiyao proudly raised her little head.

Zhu Guangyao, seeing that the little girl was so attached to her father, helplessly shook his head. One of the elderly men, who had been fiddling with his phone, suddenly spoke.

“Old Zhu, I asked Old Sui, and he really said that cane sugar is good for health!”

He showed Zhu Guangyao the chat on his phone. Zhu Guangyao looked at the screen in surprise.

“Old Sui? You asked him about this small matter?”

“Old Sui likes to teach those who want to learn,” the elderly man replied. “He said that cane sugar and malt sugar are good for health. He gave some examples.”

“He said that in addition to sweetening food, cane sugar can also be used as an external medicine. For example, when diabetic patients have foot ulcers, applying powdered cane sugar can disinfect and help heal the wound, preventing amputation.”

“He also mentioned that drinking cane sugar water before bed can prevent leg cramps, and that cane sugar is alkaline, which helps prevent cancer.”

“Moreover, cane sugar can protect teeth from decay, unlike artificial white sugar, which does the opposite by damaging teeth and contributing to stomach and pancreatic cancers.”

After listening to the voice message from Old Sui, Zhu Guangyao was silent. The tea ceremony ladies were also surprised, their mouths wide open. They had never heard that cane sugar could protect teeth and even had cancer-preventing properties!

Zhu Guangyao hadn’t expected that after trying to act wise in front of a little girl, he’d end up being proven wrong. His face flushed a little.

He looked up and saw that the little girl had already gone back to watching cartoons on her tablet.

“Well, it tastes good! Old Zhu, try this tea!”

“Osmanthus Oolong! It’s really good tea! The water is fragrant, and the tea aroma is perfectly infused. It’s rare to find such good tea!”

Zhu Guangyao, a tea lover, immediately took a sip from the cup the tea lady handed him.

The moment the tea touched his tongue, it was smooth and fragrant. When it went down his throat, it was refreshing, and he could feel the tea’s aroma spreading through his body.

“Delicious! This is top-tier tea!”

Zhu Guangyao praised, enjoying the full flavor. This was the kind of tea that, after drinking, anyone could feel the fragrance lingering in their body, making them feel at ease.

“The tea is great, but the tea-making skills are even more important.”

Zhu Guangyao looked at the tea ladies and asked, “Who made this tea?”

They all shook their heads and turned their gaze towards the little girl, who was still focused on her tablet.

Lu Xiyao, hearing someone praise the tea, looked up proudly.

“Grandpa, it’s really good tea, right? Hehe, my dad made it!”

Zhu Guangyao was surprised.

“Your dad made this tea?”

“Of course! My dad is amazing, isn’t he?” The little girl said with a proud smile.

Zhu Guangyao, now very curious about the little girl’s father, asked, “Where is your dad?”

“He’s working,” the little girl answered.

“And your mom?”

“She’s busy too.”

“So, you’re waiting for them here?”

“Mm!”

She nodded and went back to watching cartoons.

“Such a good little girl!”

Zhu Guangyao said as he took another sip of tea. Soon, Ouyang Peng arrived.

“Ha-ha, sorry, everyone, we’re a bit busy with guests!”

“Don’t be polite, come, sit down and have some tea,” Zhu Guangyao pulled a chair for him.

“Ouyang, you’re still treating me like this?” Ouyang Peng laughed as he sat down, taking a sip of tea. His eyes lit up.

“Osmanthus Oolong? What a great tea! It’s delicious!”

“See, I told you it’s great,” Zhu Guangyao said and smiled.

Ouyang Peng turned to the tea lady.

“This tea is really good. Brew a few more pots to treat the guests!”

Ouyang Peng hadn’t realized that there was such good tea at Wangjing No. 1, which he had never noticed before.

“Ouyang, this tea isn’t brewed by us, it’s brewed by this little girl’s dad,” the tea lady replied.

Ouyang Peng froze for a moment, then looked over. He had only just noticed that the little girl, Lu Xiyao, was sitting quietly, watching cartoons on her tablet.

chapters.title: Chapter 182
chapters.content:
Chapter 182 Why does the level of the head chef at Wangjing No.1 fluctuate?

Lu Xiyao raised her head and saw Ouyang Peng. She immediately sweetly called out, “Hello, Grandpa Ouyang~!”

“Eh, Xiyao, you’re so obedient. What are you doing here?”

Ouyang Peng took a handful of toffee out of his pocket and handed it to the little one. These toffees were imported and not cheap. Today, Ouyang Peng’s granddaughter, Ouyang Duoduo, came over, and Ouyang Peng had specifically asked someone to buy them.

Later, when he met the Lu family of three and saw Lu Xiyao, who was about the same age as his granddaughter, Ouyang Peng was as fond of her as Wu Rui.

He had a bit more candy in his pocket, thinking of giving it to this little cutie when they met. It seemed like older people liked giving candy to kids.

“Thank you, Grandpa Ouyang~!”

Lu Xiyao tucked the candy into her pocket.

“Xiyao, did your dad brew this Osmanthus Oolong tea?”

“Yes~!”

Ouyang Peng was secretly surprised. He didn’t expect this little Lu chef to brew such a delicious tea. Truly impressive!

Zhu Guangyao poked Ouyang Peng.

“Do you know her dad?”

“Of course. He’s a top chef from Jiangcheng whom my son specially invited over. He makes the Liver Paste 27 Soup!”

Ouyang Peng wanted to serve this tea to the guests at the birthday banquet, expecting great reviews. Maybe they wouldn’t even want to drink wine. But, unfortunately, Lu Qin was still busy in the kitchen and couldn’t serve it just yet.

What a pity.

“Liver Paste Soup!”

Zhu Guangyao, who loved fine food, became excited as well.

At this moment, Shen Muyan came back from exchanging business cards and saw that Old Master Ouyang was there. She took the initiative to greet him.

“Xiao Shen, come here, let me introduce you.”

Because of Lu Qin, Ouyang Peng was very enthusiastic towards Shen Muyan, and he called familiar people ‘Xiao Shen’.

“This is Mr. Zhu, from Beijing, Chairman of Huayao Group.”

“This is…”

Ouyang Peng carefully introduced all three, and Shen Muyan was secretly startled. All three of these older men were in charge of major enterprises in Beijing. Zhu Guangyao had even been on the national rich list, and Shen Muyan, who was in the business circle, naturally knew who he was.

Seeing that Old Master Ouyang introduced them to a young CEO, the three of them understood Ouyang Peng’s intention. Connections were something money couldn’t buy.

Zhu Guangyao understood this and didn’t outwardly care. Just because of the tea the little CEO’s husband brewed, and the upcoming Liver Paste Soup, he didn’t mind establishing a connection.

Zhu Guangyao even took the initiative to give Shen Muyan his business card, which made the rich lady feel honored. The cards she had exchanged earlier, combined, weren’t as valuable as Zhu Guangyao’s single card. And it was Zhu Guangyao who handed it to her personally.

Shen Muyan took the little one and said, “Xiyao, have you called people? Grandpa Ouyang, Grandpa Zhu…”

“Yes~!” The little one replied in her sweet voice.

After chatting for a few minutes, the three of them were all looking forward to the Liver Paste Soup at the birthday banquet.

At 6:00 PM, the banquet started. Lu Qin had already made forty servings of the Liver Paste Soup, but it wasn’t served immediately. The order in which the dishes were served had to be carefully considered.

The Liver Paste Soup was definitely the star dish chosen by Old Master Ouyang. It was served second to last. Shen Muyan sat at one of the business guests’ tables with the little one.

A few young business elites from Haishi City had their eyes full of admiration for Shen Muyan. It was the first time they saw such a beautiful young female CEO. She was an absolute goddess, stunningly beautiful, with a perfect figure.

Her cold demeanor made the men feel a strong sense of conquest. At first, they intended to sit next to the goddess, but when they saw that she came with a child, they immediately backed off.

“My CEO, is this your daughter?”

“Hello, Uncle~!”

Before Shen Muyan could respond, Lu Xiyao greeted the guests politely. Her sweet and soft voice made everyone melt.

“Eh, so well-behaved! What would you like to drink? Yogurt or juice?”

The little one earned full points for likability right off the bat.

“Juice~!”

Shen Muyan took the juice and poured a glass of freshly squeezed orange juice for Lu Xiyao. The banquet had started, and the service staff began bringing out the dishes. Shen Muyan called Lu Qin to let him know dinner was ready, and there was a seat saved for him.

“Go ahead and eat. I’ll be there shortly.”

“Daddy’s not coming?” The little one asked.

“He said he’ll come soon. Don’t worry, he’s definitely not lacking food in the kitchen.”

Lu Xiyao nodded, took a piece of cold dish—pickled radish slices—and bit into it. She quickly realized it wasn’t as good as the pickles Lu Qin made.

Shen Muyan glanced at her expression and gently pinched her cheek.

“Xiyao, don’t be picky.”

“Okay~!”

Actually, Shen Muyan knew that the little one wasn’t being picky. She was just so used to Lu Qin’s flavors that everything else tasted different. Even Shen Muyan herself didn’t have much of an appetite for these dishes and only tasted a little.

Meanwhile, a middle-aged man next to them nodded in agreement.

“No wonder it’s Wangjing No. 1. The food tastes really good! This garlic beef is delicious!”

“Shen CEO, try it as well.”

“Little one, try the beef!”

After a few more dishes were served, the service staff brought out a plate of garlic pork. The strong garlic aroma wafted through the air, instantly sparking everyone’s appetite.

“This is a famous Sichuan dish—garlic pork. It smells so good, I’m going to try a piece.”

As soon as the plate was set down, someone couldn’t resist picking up a piece. The tender, translucent white meat coated in the garlic sauce made the eater’s mouth water.

Before even taking a bite, the flavor seemed to explode in their mouth. They eagerly bit into the piece of garlic pork, and the flavor was so rich and savory, they couldn’t help but moan in delight.

The person was so excited, they couldn’t speak, only nodding and giving a thumbs up. Everyone at the banquet table was someone important, and to see such exaggerated praise for a dish proved how delicious it was!

The plate of garlic pork quickly became empty.

“Mmm… So delicious!”

“This is the best garlic pork I’ve ever had!”

Shen Muyan and Lu Xiyao each had a piece and were immediately impressed.

“Mom, this meat is really delicious!”

Unfortunately, after the plate made its rounds, there was no more. The little one was left longing for more.

“No wonder it’s Wangjing No. 1. This garlic pork is truly a masterpiece!”

For now, this garlic pork was definitely the best dish among all the ones served. Everyone began eagerly waiting for the next dish. The service staff came out again with a dish—spicy red spiral shellfish.

As soon as the plate was set down, someone immediately tried a bite.

“This shellfish isn’t as good as the garlic pork.”

After tasting it, the guest whispered.

The plate made its rounds, and only one-fifth of the dish was gone. Everyone was still puzzled, wondering why the chef at Wangjing No. 1 had such fluctuating levels of skill.

The service staff returned, bringing another plate—spicy water-boiled fish. Everyone eagerly picked up their chopsticks to try it.

“This spicy water-boiled fish is so delicious!”

Shen Muyan and Lu Xiyao both tasted it and recognized the familiar flavor.

“Mom, this is the spicy fish dad makes!”

The little one said excitedly.

A middle-aged man nearby turned to ask, “Your dad made this?”

chapters.title: Chapter 183
chapters.content:
Chapter 183 “We don’t use a soup spoon to scoop it, mind your manners! Sit down! Use chopsticks!”

“Hey, I was wondering why the chef’s skills were inconsistent, turns out it’s not the same person.”

“Case solved.”

“This garlic sauce pork and spicy boiled fish must be from the same person,” said the middle-aged man confidently.

“Little cutie from Mr. Shen’s family, are you saying your dad made this?”

“Yes, I recognize this taste, it must be my dad who made it~,” Lu Xiyao said with clear and firm eyes.

Kids don’t lie.

“Your dad is the chef at Wangjing No.1?”

Shen Muyan explained, “Her dad was invited to make liver paste soup, and after helping, we’re heading back to Jiangcheng.”

The guests at the table looked at Shen Muyan, hearing that the final dish, liver paste soup, was something they were eagerly anticipating. To their surprise, the person invited from Jiangcheng to make the dish was none other than Mr. Shen’s wife.

“His culinary skills are amazing!”

The garlic sauce pork and the spicy boiled fish were absolutely delicious. These people’s taste buds were getting unprecedented satisfaction. As the dishes were served, everyone was more enthusiastic toward Shen Muyan and her daughter, eagerly hoping there would be more of these tasty dishes.

At the table of ten, the two dishes were not enough to satisfy everyone’s craving. People who usually acted with elegance, even during meals, were now rushing to get their share.

From the moment the garlic sauce pork was served, their eyes were glued to the dish, mentally urging, “Hurry, pass it over!”

By the second round, there was barely any garlic sauce left in the dish. When the spicy boiled fish arrived, everyone quickly learned to grab it fast—slow eaters would have nothing left.

“Hey! Hey! Mr. Li, no using a soup spoon! Mind your manners! Sit down! Use chopsticks!”

When the dish reached Mr. Li, he shamelessly scooped a large portion of the fish with a big soup spoon, taking about a third of it for himself.

Was he operating a bulldozer in the past?

The big bowl of spicy boiled fish lasted until the second round before it was finished. Immediately, someone praised Shen Muyan.

“Mr. Shen, your spouse has redefined what delicious boiled fish is!”

“The fish is so tender, the spiciness tingles your tongue, it’s truly satisfying!”

“I’ve never had such delicious spicy boiled fish!”

The word “spouse” sounded quite sweet to Shen Muyan. She smiled faintly, wanting to say something like “Eat more,” but saw that the whole bowl of fish had already been wiped clean.

The few business elites who once had inappropriate thoughts about Shen Goddess were now completely extinguished. It was no wonder people say the way to a woman’s heart is through her stomach. With such unbeatable culinary skills, how could Shen Goddess not be charmed?

Not long after, the waiter brought out a plate of twice-cooked pork, its rich, mouth-watering aroma making everyone drool.

“This is definitely Chef Lu’s work!”

Someone confirmed it with the waiter and got a positive response. Wow, a true “rice companion” dish had arrived!

The whole table suddenly sounded like a clinking of chopsticks. A neighboring table looked over to see the guests devouring their food silently, completely absorbed.

“Why are you guys only eating one dish?”

“Hey, why don’t we have any twice-cooked pork?”

“How come we’re treated differently?”

Looking at the twice-cooked pork, they couldn’t resist.

“We don’t have it because Chef Lu’s wife and daughter are here, he specially made extra dishes for them,” the waiter explained.

The guests at the table, now aware, felt embarrassed, but they couldn’t help but feel disappointed.

After the twice-cooked pork was served to Shen Muyan and her daughter, everyone else let them have more. Shen Muyan felt pleased, as her relationship with Boss Lu had really earned her some face.

Another round of food was served: crystal shrimp dumplings. These dumplings had translucent skins revealing the tender shrimp inside, looking irresistible. Again, it was Chef Lu’s handiwork. Other tables had no such dish, and everyone waited for it to arrive at Shen Muyan’s table.

When the dish arrived, no one touched their chopsticks until it reached them. They all waited for Shen Muyan and her daughter to start.

Shen Muyan served herself one dumpling, gave her daughter two, and said, “Let’s all eat together.”

It felt like how court officials wait for the emperor to start eating before they are allowed to. The vanity was real, and the rich lady accepted it gladly, feeling quite satisfied.

A guest from a nearby table, noticing, leaned over and asked, “Is it good, the crystal shrimp dumpling?”

“It’s incredible, even better than the authentic ones from our hometown in Lingnan!”

It shocked everyone!

One elderly gentleman, who was from Lingnan, said the dumplings were better than those in his hometown.

“Can I have a taste?” He politely asked.

These were high-profile guests, so it was unusual for one to ask for food from another table. But the elderly man had spoken, and out of respect, they allowed him a taste. The guests at the neighboring table were all envious.

After tasting, the old man’s face lit up, and he shouted, “Damn, this is so good!”

This loud exclamation left everyone stunned. The elderly man, who had previously been polite, now completely let loose.

Wealthy people with no manners, too, frequently cursed, making Shen Muyan glance at him coldly, covering her daughter’s ears.

“What did you just hear?” She whispered.

“I didn’t hear anything~!”

The little one had a built-in filtering system for the adult world.

But from the old man’s enthusiastic reaction, it was clear that the crystal shrimp dumplings were truly delicious!

That mother and daughter duo were really lucky! Their dad sure spoiled them!

chapters.title: Chapter 184
chapters.content:
Chapter 184 “Good wine and good dishes are all on the table! What’s the deal with eating the main course?

After the crystal shrimp dumplings, another plate of Empress Chicken Wings arrived. A table nearby couldn’t sit still anymore—was that a blunt knife touching the meat?

It’s unfair! This is really not fair!

It’s the first time I’ve seen a special dish at a birthday banquet!

The key point is that the food is delicious! You can tell just from the bare plates!

I’m not exaggerating when I say that they were cleaner than a dog’s lick!

The people who can attend Mr. Ouyang’s birthday banquet are certainly individuals with a certain social standing. They must have eaten many delicious dishes, but to be driven to lick the plate—just think about how delicious the food must be!

And then, you see people who can’t eat!

It’s enough to make you grit your teeth in frustration!

Snatching food!

There were about ten crystal shrimp dumplings on the plate. After everyone had one, the remaining dumplings were kept for Chef Lu’s wife and daughter.

But one wasn’t enough. These shrimp dumplings were smooth, chewy, and incredibly delicious.

I would call them the “shrimp dumpling emperor.” I’ve never had such delicious dumplings, and one plate isn’t enough to eat.

Everyone at the table couldn’t get enough. After tasting the fresh dumplings, they were still unsatisfied. Other dishes couldn’t be eaten anymore. They were just sitting there.

The table beside them could finally relax. When people are desperate, they start grabbing food!

Then, the star dish—liver paste soup—was served. There wasn’t much, just a small bowl for each person. The table next door also dreamed of tasting Chef Lu’s food.

The soup was delicate like tofu and had an extremely fresh taste! No wonder it was the star dish!

Since the portion wasn’t much, no one dared to gulp it down. They sipped it slowly, savoring every bite to enjoy the full flavor. It was so tender! So tender!

After everyone tasted it, all the guests were amazed.

“ Tsk tsk, Old Master, this liver paste soup is really good!”

“So delicious! So tasty! The liver paste is tender, the broth is fresh—absolutely amazing!”

“No wonder it’s the star dish! It deserves the title!”

“The chef who made this liver paste soup must be at the level of a state banquet chef, right?”

“The taste of the pig liver is there but without the unpleasant odor—really delicious!”

Everyone was satisfied, and praise was showered on the chef. Mr. Ouyang was very pleased, his face glowing with pride. Chef Lu came back.

He walked over to the table where Shen Mu Yan was sitting and took a seat between her and Lu Xiyao. He had a plate of ice crystal cake in his hand.

“Did you eat well? Are you full?” Chef Lu asked while pinching the little one’s soft cheek.

“Daddy, drink orange soda~!”

Little one brought her orange soda to Chef Lu’s lips.

Chef Lu took a sip from the straw. It was very refreshing. The table finally saw the real Chef Lu.

Younger than expected, but wow, he’s handsome!

Not only handsome, but his culinary skills are also top-notch!

The business elites at the table were completely convinced. How could someone be so outstanding?

But now they had no time to compliment him. Their eyes were fixed on the plate Chef Lu had brought.

“Chef Lu, what’s this?” They asked.

Just as Chef Lu was about to speak, he heard Mr. Ouyang’s loud voice calling for him.

Chef Lu stood up.

“This is Chef Lu, who made the liver paste soup!”

Mr. Ouyang proudly announced.

Chef Lu’s fame was well-earned.

The guests at the table were high-status individuals, and Chef Lu’s presence brought even more prestige to the banquet. But Chef Lu’s response was calm and composed, his smile serene.

This calm demeanor earned him more respect from the guests. No wonder Chef Lu was so highly regarded—he was seen the world and was never flustered.

Chef Lu sat down, and both the wealthy lady and the little one’s eyes gleamed with admiration. The guests at the nearby tables couldn’t help but stare at the plate of ice crystal cake.

They saw it was brought by Chef Lu himself. It must be a dessert after the meal. They were especially eager to taste it!

But they definitely wouldn’t get a chance!

They envied those who sat at the same table as Chef Lu–they were the lucky ones!

Chef Lu casually answered, “This is ice crystal cake, a type of soft rice dough cake. Everyone can try it.”

The table instantly perked up.

They were all energetic and eager to try it. Chef Lu was polite, but they weren’t going to be polite back. So, the ice crystal cake was passed around, and soon the plate was empty.

Each person had a piece, and they shook their heads in satisfaction. The guests at the nearby tables were envious, their eyes green with jealousy!

Chef Lu casually asked the mother and daughter, “Are you full? If not, I can make a couple more dishes.”

He knew that with so many people at the table, they wouldn’t get much to eat. Just like the ice crystal cake earlier—by the time it went around, everyone had only one piece.

Not enough for them? He’d make more!

Chef Lu picked up a piece of the stir-fried lamb’s tripe with flowers. These fusion dishes just don’t compare to traditional dishes. They have a lot of flair but aren’t as tasty.

Of course, Chef Lu was comparing it to his own traditional dishes.

Who could beat them?

None could!

A restaurant as high-end as Wangjing No.1, a birthday banquet as grand as Mr. Ouyang’s—yet, a few of Chef Lu’s dishes were the shining stars. The dishes on the table didn’t even move much, but the ones Chef Lu made were glowing.

So, when anyone could perfect the taste of traditional dishes, there was no need for fancy fusion or molecular cuisine.

“I’ll go fry some noodles,” Chef Lu said as he couldn’t eat any more of these dishes and needed something to fill his stomach.

His comment drew curious looks from the nearby tables.

Fried noodles?

They were so excited about it!

One person from the neighboring table eagerly begged Chef Lu to fry them a portion. They really wanted to eat it.

Chef Lu was a bit surprised.

You don’t want to eat the expensive sea cucumber, but you want fried noodles? He thought.

But the guest wasn’t a freeloader. He quickly took out a gold card. It was a VIP card from a large domestic supermarket chain, giving a 30% discount on everything. The gold card was handed over to Chef Lu, who initially tried to refuse.

But this card was worth quite a bit. A plate of fried noodles only cost about ten yuan, and the card could save a lot.

“I don’t need it,” Chef Lu said, but the guest insisted.

Then, Shen Mu Yan walked over and took the card.

Chef Lu’s fried noodles weren’t available just like that. This gold card was a fair exchange. The other guests understood and had the same idea. They started offering Chef Lu various VIP cards, hoping to get some fried noodles.

But they didn’t directly offer the cards for noodles. They just wanted to be friends with Chef Lu. With new friendships formed, Chef Lu went to the kitchen to fry some noodles. It didn’t take long. A large plate of fried noodles was brought to the table, and the guests eagerly dug in, sharing the plate.

At Wangjing No.1, no one usually ate the main course. But at this birthday banquet, with all the fine food on the table, what was the deal with eating the main course?

Well, it turned out they all fought for it!

Chef Lu was a genius!

chapters.title: Chapter 185
chapters.content:
Chapter 185 Food is the sky for the people, Chef Lu, you are my sky!

“This fried rice noodles are so delicious!”

“Eh? Fried rice noodles can smell so good? I’ve never had such delicious fried rice noodles in Haishi!”

“It’s Chef Lu’s cooking! Next time, when my father-in-law has his birthday, I’ll invite Chef Lu. You name the price—pick-up by car, airplane is fine!”

“Chef Lu’s cooking is unbeatable! He could probably make fried shoe insoles taste delicious!”

The plate holding the fried rice noodles was the largest size available at Wangjing No. 1, just a little smaller than a typical basin. A pile of fried rice noodles sat like a little mountain, generously portioned to satisfy hunger.

The dish was garnished with red and green vegetables and peppers, with the wok fragrance filling the air, arousing the guests’ appetites. When a guest picked up some noodles, they were smooth and loose, not tangled like hair, and didn’t drag the sauce. The noodles were different from others they’d had before.

They noticed that when the fried rice noodles were served, no matter how big a bite they took, they didn’t choke. The noodles were greasy but not heavy, crispy yet tender—absolutely the best fried rice noodles ever.

The guests praised Chef Lu’s skills and agreed that it was a blessing to marry someone like him. Many big names even handed their business cards to Shen Muyan, eager to make connections, offering to keep in touch and maintain good relations. Shen Muyan was aware that they were really interested in her husband, but she felt proud too.

Lu Xiyao loved hearing people praise her father more than hearing praise for herself. The guests who came to the birthday banquet were initially not there just for the food. Building relationships and networking was the real goal. But after the liver paste soup made by Lu Qin was served, the atmosphere began to change.

The guests’ appetites were instantly piqued. They had never tasted anything so delicious. The liver paste soup was a high-end national banquet dish!

Although the portion was small—just one bite per person—larger portions followed, and soon, a large plate of fried rice noodles arrived. The guests eagerly grabbed at it, and those who were slow had nothing left!

Several chefs from Wangjing No. 1 watched their meticulously prepared dishes being ignored, feeling defeated.

“How could fried rice noodles beat expensive seafood?” One of them sighed in defeat.

Gu Tielin saw everyone fighting for the fried rice noodles and felt embarrassed. At the old man Ouyang’s birthday banquet, their finely crafted dishes were overshadowed by a simple plate of fried rice noodles!

This would be a disaster for Wangjing No. 1’s reputation if it got out. Lu Qin walked out of the kitchen to the hall, and all eyes were on him.

“Chef Lu, how can your fried rice noodles be so delicious?”

“Food is the sky for the people, Chef Lu, you are my sky!”

“Chef Lu, come to my restaurant, just your fried rice noodles could sell for 1288!”

Ouyang Peng laughed. By the end of the banquet, all the attention was on Chef Lu, overshadowing the birthday star, Ouyang Peng. But Ouyang didn’t mind. He leisurely enjoyed his bowl of fried rice noodles.

It was a good thing he was the birthday celebrant—otherwise, he wouldn’t even have gotten that bowl. Despite being elderly, everyone at the table fought like wrestlers to grab the noodles.

Zhu Guangyao, feeling a bit embarrassed, managed to grab a whole bowl of fried rice noodles, despite the commotion.

Lu Qin smiled and asked, “How do you all like the taste? The rice noodles’ quality isn’t quite perfect, which affects the taste a bit.”

The guests were stunned.

“These fried rice noodles aren’t perfect?”

If they were perfect, wouldn’t they be out of this world?

Gu Tielin’s muscles twitched. Although his words didn’t directly involve them, it felt like an invisible slap to the face. How could he still be criticizing the ingredients?

After such praise, Lu Qin even criticized the dish!

The birthday banquet ended after a plate of divine fried rice noodles. Everyone was happy.

Ouyang Peng stood up and smiled, “Everyone full now?”

“Full, full!”

“If Chef Lu’s dishes come again, I’d still find room for more!”

“I can’t eat anymore, but I can scrape it out and eat it again!”

After the banquet, Lu Qin was invited by Ouyang Peng.

The guests, besides thanking Ouyang Peng, sincerely thanked Lu Qin. Lu Qin’s phone contacts were forcefully added with the names of several billionaires. Shen Muyan was envious—this was a rare networking opportunity!

The boss of Wangjing No. 1 found Ouyang Lin, venting his frustrations.

“Ouyang, who is this Chef Lu? The whole kitchen team of Wangjing No. 1 was obliterated by a young chef!”

“How could a plate of fried rice noodles outshine all the precious ingredients we’ve used?”

“You’re honest with me—did you send someone to sabotage us?”

The boss of Wangjing No. 1 looked miserable.

Ouyang Lin, feeling smug, replied apologetically, “Gong, I’m truly sorry. Chef Lu’s daughter was craving the food and made extra dishes by accident. We didn’t expect such a reaction.”

The boss of Wangjing No. 1 felt like cursing but tried to hold it in.

Ouyang Lin, his face barely hiding a grin, explained, “Honestly, at first, the boss at Wangjing No. 1 kept boasting about the strength of the kitchen team, how they were top-tier in Haishi, even in the province.”

“But the liver paste soup was a disaster! You can’t even make it! So, we had to ask Lu Qin for help. If it weren’t for him, this banquet would have been a letdown.”

After the banquet, Lu Qin had no further business. It was time for the blind box event. Ouyang Lin handed Lu Qin a bank card.

“Lu, no need for words. The thanks are all in the card.”

“Let’s cooperate happily.”

Lu Qin smiled slightly, took the card, and replied, “Cooperate happily.”

Ouyang Lin invited Lu Qin to stay in Haishi for a couple more days with full hospitality. However, Lu Qin declined. The next day, their daughter was going to kindergarten, and Shen Muyan had to work, so they had to head back to Jiangcheng. Lu Qin also had to return to the stall, as he hadn’t earned many system points in the past two days.

Lu Qin gave Ouyang Lin some ice crystal cakes and pickled chicken feet as a thank-you, saying they were made during their short break in the kitchen at Wangjing No. 1. Ouyang Lin hesitated but accepted the gift with gratitude.

“You know, I should have prepared some local specialties for you as the host,” Ouyang Lin said.

Lu Qin chuckled, “Everything’s in the card.”

Ouyang Lin sent them to the Kaila Hotel, and Lu Qin drove back, stopping at a gas station to refuel. Shen Muyan offered to drive, but Lu Qin, energetic as ever, insisted on driving.

Before they hit the highway, Lu Qin checked the balance in his bank account. Eighty million. Ouyang Lin truly was generous. This trip was a great success. Lu Qin was now a millionaire.

chapters.title: Chapter 186
chapters.content:
Chapter 186 “Creating Friends Out of Nothing! Is Boss Lu a Ninja?”

“The big sun in the middle of winter!”

“In the cornfield, warm and sunny!”

“Yo! Yo!”

The little one lay in the spacious back seat, enjoying her last moment of fun before kindergarten. Lu Qin and Shen Muyan exchanged a glance, unsure of where the little one had learned these songs.

Halfway through, the little one’s battery ran out, and the phone shut off. Shen Muyan covered her with a light blanket. The car suddenly became quieter, and soft music played from the car’s sound system. Lu Qin focused on driving, while Shen Muyan secretly observed him.

The man had distinct features, his profile like a sculpture, with a chiseled jawline that softened into a gentle edge, handsome and charming. The rich woman loved looking at him.

Perhaps she could look at him for a lifetime and never get tired. It seemed like he had become even more handsome than before.

Was it just an illusion?

Lu Qin felt her cold gaze beside him and handed her a tissue.

“What’s this for?”

Shen Muyan raised an eyebrow.

“If you’re done looking, you can wipe the drool,” Lu Qin said with a hint of a smile.

Shen Muyan’s fair face flushed slightly, and she scoffed. There was no way she was drooling. After that, the rich woman stopped sneaking glances and took out her phone to scroll through.

Ding ding.

Fang Ya popped up a chat message.

Shen Muyan didn’t know how Fang Ya caught onto such a sensitive question, but the gossip was now at the critical point.

“Same room.”

“Big bed?”

“Yeah.”

“Did you… after the little one fell asleep, did you…?”

“Nothing happened.”

Shen Muyan answered without guilt, feeling at ease. However, she suddenly remembered that morning when she had been lying in Lu Qin’s arms. Her ears flushed red. She had even grabbed his solid abs and slim waist. It had to be said, the feeling was great.

Fang Ya shook her head in regret.

“Boss Lu is worse than a beast!”

“What are you saying? Do you still want to mooch food?”

“Yo, you’re already starting to protect him.”

“…”

“But speaking of which, with your charm, Shen, shouldn’t it be impossible for Lu Qin to resist? Do you wear clothes when you sleep?”

“Shut up! Pervert!”

Shen Muyan didn’t want to continue, especially with Fang Ya’s incessant wild remarks, which she could not counter.

Fang Ya guessed that there must have been some progress between Shen Muyan and Lu Qin. When she returned, she’d definitely have to interrogate her. Playing games wasn’t interesting. Watching sugar (couple moments) was far more fun.

An hour and a half later, the car reached the old district. Lu Qin carried the little one back to the room, while Shen Muyan entered and grabbed the key to the Maserati CEO car.

“I’ll go now.”

“Mm, drive slowly and get some rest when you get home.”

At the door, Shen Muyan turned around. The warm light from inside the house filled the air, and the beautiful, romantic atmosphere lingered in the night.

The rich woman’s captivating face seemed even more delicate and enchanting under the orange light. Lu Qin’s breath caught in his throat.

Shen Muyan tilted her head, her gaze locking with Lu Qin’s. She pursed her red lips, feeling a premonition of what was about to happen. Sure enough, Boss Lu moved.

He slowly leaned in. Shen Muyan’s fair fingers clenched the corner of her clothes, and that handsome face drew closer. She slowly closed her eyes, her heart racing, her long lashes trembling slightly.

Click.

Lu Qin’s hand circled Shen Muyan, turning the door handle.

“It’s late. You should go back and rest.”

Shen Muyan opened her eyes, shocked, then quickly suppressed her disappointment, putting on a cold expression.

“Leaving now.”

She turned around and walked towards her car.

“Am I really not charming enough?”

Shen Muyan was filled with doubt as she started the car. Lu Qin watched the Maserati disappear into the night before closing the door. He didn’t act impulsively; he wasn’t ready for that step yet.

If things progressed so naturally with Shen Muyan, would life go back to what it was before?

She worked, and he stayed home taking care of the child. Or would their lives remain unchanged, with him still bringing up the kid and setting up a stall? If she expected him to be a househusband again? The divorce was less than a month ago.

Lu Qin felt his life now was fine, and he didn’t want to change it easily. Shen Muyan might be the variable. So, he held himself back. Back at the villa, Shen Muyan felt inexplicably restless.

Lying in the bathtub, the smooth bath liquid running over her fair skin, she finally felt a bit better. She looked at her long, straight legs and curvy figure; it should be enough to attract someone.

Did he really not have any interest in her?

The rich woman couldn’t figure it out, so she took out her phone and sent a WeChat message to Fang Ya, hoping for some analysis.

Fang Ya, seeing the message, was stunned: Creating friends out of nothing?

Fang Ya laughed inwardly. Seems like Shen Muyan didn’t need to be interrogated after all; she was delivering herself.

“Mm, you have a friend, and then?”

Fang Ya asked, trying to guide her.

“You’re saying he rejected your… friend?”

Fang Ya widened her eyes. Was Boss Lu a ninja? The atmosphere had already reached that point, and he still managed to drive it into a ditch?

Fang Ya thought, if it were her, she would’ve immediately pulled Shen Muyan’s waist, taking her from the door to the hallway, from the hallway to the living room, from the living room to the kitchen, and then to the balcony—crushing it all the way!

Afterward, Shen Muyan would have been as soft as noodles, leaning on her chest, drawing circles with her finger.

Was Boss Lu… incapable?

“What should my friend do next?” Shen Muyan asked.

Fang Ya pondered for a moment and began to strategize.

“This is actually very simple. You need to be a bit more aggressive, take turns chasing and retreating. When the other person has nowhere to run, they’ll have no choice but to submit.”

“Like this… You should tell your friend to do this and that…”

They talked until midnight. Fang Ya gave Shen Muyan a detailed rundown of her Thirty-six Strategies to Capture a Man.

After closing the door, Lu Qin walked into the kitchen. He found that the fridge and freezer were already stocked with ingredients like rice noodles, mung beans, pork, vegetables, etc., for tomorrow’s breakfast stall.

Xiao Mi had already sold out the food Lu Qin prepared before he left yesterday. Today, she sold out the pickled cabbage from the jars, around 400 portions, in just one morning.

The customers were complaining. They had just been paid, and they had all the cash ready, but there was nothing left to buy!

Xiao Mi said the customers nearly bought all the pickled cabbage jars and even the pots and lids, saying if they couldn’t eat it, they’d at least smell it.

Lu Qin shook his head, amused. Looks like the customers were starving. He pulled out his phone and sent a message in the QQ group.

chapters.title: Chapter 187
chapters.content:
Chapter 187 “Is This Free to Watch? The Thirty-Six Strategies for Capturing Men!”

“WTF! Boss Lu is back from the dead!”

“Boss Lu is finally back? If he didn’t return soon, I was going to report him missing!”

“Missing person returned!”

“Rashimah! Our chef is back!”

“What? Boss Lu is back? Then I’ve just been reincarnated!”

“Reincarnated as a hungry ghost?”

“Emaciated, weak, starving, cold and hungry, waiting to be fed, enduring hunger, suffering…”

“My goddess said if she doesn’t get her Osmanthus Oolong milk tea, she’ll break up! Tomorrow is the deadline! Thank goodness, Boss Lu, you’re finally back!”

“You’re the only clingy dog I don’t mind! Your goddess has good taste!”

…

Lu Qin was used to the fast-scrolling group messages and edited a group announcement to send.

Once the announcement was sent, the group erupted.

Lu Qin pickled ten jars of vegetables, took a shower, and comfortably lay in bed.

Current system points: 2113.

Before going to sleep, he decided to use two advanced draws.

Charisma +1?

Lu Qin took a selfie without any beauty filters. He looked at it carefully—his features hadn’t changed much, but somehow, he seemed more pleasing to the eye. It wasn’t vanity, he just couldn’t help but want to look at it again.

Looks like the charisma attribute isn’t a joke.

Just as he was about to sleep, the rich woman sent a message. He opened it. Lu Qin widened his eyes and took two deep breaths.

A photo of her beautiful legs!

It was easy to tell it was the rich woman’s.

Under a black Valentino skirt, a pair of smooth, straight legs in high-gloss black stockings—enough to stir one’s blood.

Is this free to watch?

Was this really a test for a leader?

Lu Qin stared blankly at the phone for a minute before regaining his composure. This wasn’t the rich woman’s style; it was a little too far from her usual cold, CEO persona.

Lu Qin was about to send a question mark when he noticed the photo had been retracted.

“…”

…

At the villa, Shen Muyan removed the black stockings, her face burning with embarrassment. She tossed her phone aside and buried her face in the pillow. The dog-headed military strategist Fang Ya’s plan, one of the thirty-six strategies for capturing men.

Research showed that over 80% of men first focus on a woman’s legs. No man can resist the allure of sexy legs, and if there’s more, add black stockings. So, Shen Muyan went through several pairs of stockings before picking the most seductive one.

After successfully tempting Boss Lu for a minute, she quickly retracted the photo. Then she covered it up by saying, “Sent it to the wrong person,” leaving Boss Lu to think for herself.

Five minutes later, Shen Muyan suddenly realized a problem. What if Boss Lu misunderstood?

She thought for a moment, took out her phone, and sent another message.

Shen Muyan froze.

That was it? Just “Oh”?

A few seconds later, Lu Qin sent another message.

Shen Muyan scoffed, her face turning red, as she applied a face mask and went to bed.

On the other end, Lu Qin couldn’t fall asleep. Every time he closed his eyes, he saw stockings. It took him ten minutes of chanting the calming mantra to finally calm his mind.

…

The next morning, at 4 AM, Xiao Mi arrived on her tricycle. Lu Qin had given her a key. She went straight to the kitchen, cooked mung bean paste, soaked rice noodles, washed and chopped vegetables, and prepared the filling. Everything was quiet and orderly, not disturbing the father and daughter’s rest.

At 5:30 AM, Lu Qin got up. Xiao Mi had everything ready, waiting for the chef to take over.

“Morning, boss.”

“Morning, Xiao Mi. Once I finish kneading the dough, let it rise and you can start wrapping the shrimp dumplings. I’m heading to the market for some ingredients; we’re launching the Bosi oil cake today.”

“Got it, boss.”

Lu Qin drove to the nearest farmer’s market, buying 30 kilos of flour, 10 kilos of pork lard, 3 kilos of red dates, and a jar of rose honey. Back home, Lu Qin steamed the ice crystal cake first, then rendered the lard.

“Xiao Mi, turn the 3 kilos of red dates into date paste. Remember to cook it on low heat, stirring often to avoid sticking to the pan. No need to add sugar, these dates are sweet enough.”

“Understood, boss.”

The Bosi oil cakes were made last. The dough puffs opened like spider webs in hot oil, then were pulled out and set aside to cool before packaging.

Packaging was tricky, as they were delicate and could crumble easily.

Lu Qin had Xiao Mi pack slowly and went to wake up the little one. Lu Qin opened the kitchen door, and the smell of rendered lard wafted into the room, immediately waking the little one.

“Wow~! Smells so good~!”

Lu Qin pinched the little one’s nose, and in a few seconds, she was fully awake.

“Daddy, is there pork cracklings?”

The little one loved eating pork cracklings, especially when sprinkled with sugar—it was crispy and delicious.

“Yes, I’ll pack you a box to take to kindergarten as a snack.”

“Yay~! Daddy is the best~! Muah~!”

The little one planted a kiss on Lu Qin’s face and ran off to wash up. After breakfast, Lu Qin took the little one to kindergarten, while Xiao Mi stayed home to wash the dishes and pack up the goods before heading out to set up the stall.

It was a bit of a traffic jam on Monday morning, but after dropping the little one off at kindergarten, Lu Qin drove to Sunshine Elementary School.

Xiao Mi had just arrived at the battlefield. A long line of people stretched from the street corner to the traffic light, twice the usual crowd, about 120 people.

More customers were on the way, as not everyone could wake up early. This terrifying scene startled many passersby. No other stalls were left in front of Sunshine Elementary School; with Lu Qin’s food stall there, no one else was making money.

There was only one stubborn bun shop still open, as not everyone managed to get food from Lu Qin’s stall.

chapters.title: Chapter 188
chapters.content:
Chapter 188 “Taking Digestive Tablets While Showing Off Fried Noodles!”

“Finally, you’re here! Three servings of fried rice noodles, two cups of mung bean paste, one box of ice crystal cakes, is the new Bosi oil cake limited? Sure enough, it’s limited; you can only get one!”

“I’ll take everything, this is my meal for the day.”

“One box of pickled vegetables is enough, everything else should be packed full. No milk tea this morning?”

…

The food cart just parked, and customers rushed over eagerly. The Bosi oil cake was 50 per serving, 6 pieces per box. In a big restaurant, it might be priced over 100, but for a food stall, 50 per serving is already considered high. However, at Lu’s food stall, the price didn’t really matter.

First, it was because the food was always delicious, and second, because Boss Lu was trustworthy and never charged unfair prices. 200 servings of Bosi oil cake sold out in less than half an hour.

“This is my first time trying Bosi oil cake, it’s delicious!”

“Crunchy on the outside, tender on the inside, not greasy at all, beats all other oil cakes, I’m serious!”

The new product received unanimous praise from customers, and once again confirmed one thing—anything Boss Lu made was guaranteed to be delicious, even if it was Bosi pot cover or fried insoles!

“Dear customers, we at Lu’s Food Stall offer free digestive tablets. If you’ve overeaten, stuffed yourself, or are feeling bloated, come get some. However, we don’t encourage excessive eating.”

Xiao Mi had already unpacked and cut 20 boxes of digestive tablets into smaller pieces. You only need to take one per day, and it’ll strengthen your digestion and absorption all day, preventing indigestion, stomach acidity, and bloating. Some customers, who often overeat or have weak digestion, came over to grab a tablet.

“You think we want to overeat? We can’t help it!”

A customer ate a tablet, and just a few seconds after swallowing, their stomach began to rumble loudly.

“Is the effect this fast?”

Before long, their stomach felt much better.

“Impressive! Now I can eat two more servings of fried rice noodles.”

…

Taking digestive tablets while showing off fried noodles, really?

Typical, forgetting the pain after the wound has healed.

…

The morning stall revenue was around 28,000, and Lu’s Food Stall’s income was increasing daily. The number of people in the QQ group had already reached 1,300.

In the southern part of the city, Lu’s Food Stall had become well-known and widely recognized. The Lotus District Cultural and Tourism Department, in collaboration with the Food and Beverage Association, was preparing to hold a large-scale food festival event and had already started drawing traffic and openly recruiting participants.

The recruitment was not limited to specialty food stalls and beverages, but also extended to trendy toys, cultural and creative products, unique souvenirs, fashion clothing, seasonal fresh fruits, etc.

Some customers from the Lotus District had already taken a screenshot of the recruitment poster and sent it to the group.

Under strong customer requests, Lu Qin filled out the application form. At the Food and Beverage Association’s office. President Qin Hui was reviewing the selected applications.

“Old Wang’s water-boiled beef offal from Qingchi District? It’s been open for thirty years? This one’s good!”

“Fang Jie’s beef cakes from our district? The one at Cross Street? I eat there often! This one’s a must!”

“Stinky tofu from Shashi City? Didn’t we already have one apply? This one passes! It’s become too common, no appeal, one is enough.”

“Xu’s crayfish? We have over ten chain stores in Jiangcheng, that’s a specialty!”

“Lu’s Food Stall from Annan District? What do they specialize in? Fried rice noodles? Shrimp dumplings? Mung bean paste? Do they even sell twice-cooked pork? It’s all over the place, it must be bad, pass!”

“Chen’s braised food…”

Lu Qin received a text message, informing him that his application for the food festival stall had been rejected, the reason: limited stall spaces, and his application was not selected.

“Oh well, saved 800 for the stall fee.”

Lu Qin wasn’t concerned, he could set up anywhere, he wasn’t lacking customers. After finishing at the Flower and Fruit Mountain Park, Lu Qin drove to pick up the little one from school. Xiao Mi, naturally, was driving the food cart back and also preparing for the night snack stall.

Lu Qin waited at the kindergarten entrance, standing out from the crowd, which caught the attention of several mothers.

“Yao Yao’s dad, you seem… to have gotten more handsome!”

“Qin Qin’s mom, are you going crazy? Hahaha…”

Qin Qin’s mom was single, so the other parents joked around. Qin Qin’s mom was pretty and gentle, and she had decent conditions. She glanced at Lu Qin, her cheeks turning slightly red.

Lu Qin was a star parent at Starlight Kindergarten. His good looks aside, his superb cooking skills had already won over many parents, teachers, and kids.

Qin Qin’s mom was thinking about chatting with Lu Qin again when a Porsche sports car smoothly stopped at the kindergarten entrance. The bright red color caught everyone’s attention.

The car door opened, and a pair of long, slender legs stepped out, followed by a stunningly beautiful, cold-faced woman. The CEO Shen Muyan arrived in style. She wore a luxurious white silk blouse, with a well-fitted black pencil skirt that accentuated her beautiful waist and hips.

A pair of red-bottomed black stilettos made her fair legs look even slimmer and longer, exuding a pure and seductive aura. The sound of her heels echoed as she walked over, and the parents’ eyes followed her movements, with both men and women being equally captivated.

Lu Qin looked at the rich woman walking toward him, and there was no doubt—she was beautiful today. But Lu Qin was puzzled as to why she was here.

Shen Muyan was quite pleased with Lu Qin’s gaze. She walked coldly up to him, then turned to face the kindergarten entrance, waiting together with him.

“The hotel has no issues, I’m here to pick up the little one.”

The thirty-six strategies for capturing men—creating an unintentional presence.

Don’t deliberately appear in front of a man, but don’t completely avoid appearing either. It’s best to show up casually or by coincidence.

Currently, Fang Ya, the dog-headed military strategist, only wanted to come up with these two strategies. At the moment, she was holding a book titled How to Hook a Man and scribbling notes.

Shen Muyan’s presence made Qin Qin’s mom and the other mothers unconsciously step back a few paces, creating some space. The aura of the cold goddess was overwhelming. Lu Qin’s nostrils flared slightly.

“Did you spray perfume? The top note is citrus, the middle note is rose and lily of the valley, and the base note is sandalwood, hibiscus, and ambergris. It smells good.”

“What nose do you have? Can you smell that in such detail?”

Shen Muyan glanced at him, saying honestly, she didn’t even know the notes of the perfume she wore. She had picked it based on price first, then packaging, and lastly, the fragrance.

She didn’t usually wear perfume and could barely finish a small bottle in six months. If it weren’t for knowing Lu Qin’s character, she’d think he must have studied women’s perfumes, making him a professional “sea king.”

“Good cooking requires a very sensitive sense of smell and taste,” Lu Qin casually explained.

At that moment, the children from the kindergarten came out, shouting and laughing.

“Daddy~!”

The little one spotted Lu Qin and ran over, leaping into his arms, then immediately transformed into a koala.

Shen Muyan stood beside them for a few seconds before coldly reminding.

“Yao Yao, didn’t you see your mom standing here?”

“Ah? When did you appear, Mom?”

The little one turned around and finally saw the rich woman.

chapters.title: Chapter 189
chapters.content:
Chapter 189 “Where do kids have money? Rich mom gives money! Boss Lu, do you want to join in?”

Shen Muyan furrowed her brows lightly. Despite her being right there, the little one didn’t see her. Apparently, all his attention was on his dad!

Shen Muyan refused to admit she had failed as a mother and just snatched the ice cream from him.

“Mom~!”

“When did you show up?”

Lu Xiyao finished sticking to Boss Lu and then opened her arms to stick to Shen Muyan. Actually, sticking to a rich mom was quite comfortable—her skin was delicate and smooth, and it smelled nice.

“I’ve been here all along, but someone didn’t see me!” Shen Muyan pretended to be angry.

“Mom, don’t be mad, I’ll buy ice cream for you~!”

Shen Muyan looked at the little one’s outstretched hand with wide eyes.

“What do you mean?”

“I’m just a kid, kids don’t have money, rich mom gives money~!”

“……”

That actually made a lot of sense!

Lu Qin smiled and saw that Shen Muyan was about to flick the little one’s forehead. He quickly played peacemaker.

“I’ll take the little one to buy it. What flavor would you like?”

Shen Muyan put down her ‘weapon’ and said, “Vanilla and nuts.”

“Dad, I want melon and rose cherry~!”

Parents outside the kindergarten saw this scene and looked on enviously. A warm family of three like this might be the epitome of happiness. Shen Muyan drove a Porsche and followed Lu Qin to his rented house.

Xiaomi was busy in the kitchen. When she saw Lu Qin and the others come back, she came out to greet them.

“Boss, boss lady, Miss Yaoyao.”

The rich mom felt pleased hearing this. She thought Xiaomi, the employee, was very polite and had a lot of life in her. The boss lady liked such employees. Xiaomi finished greeting them and then went back to work seriously.

Slap!

Three red bills were slapped on the table.

“I’m not one to mooch off of others. Don’t say I’m always freeloading; I paid for it,” Shen Muyan said justifiably.

Lu Qin smiled.

“Alright, Yaoyao, help daddy put the money away.”

“Okay, daddy~!”

The little one carefully folded the three bills, put them in her pocket, and patted them. Lu Qin went into the kitchen to prepare dinner.

Shen Muyan watched the little one’s actions, her lips curling.

“Little money-lover.”

Lu Xiyao turned her big eyes and walked over to Shen Muyan. In a soft and cute voice, she said, “Mom, are you tired? Let me give you a massage~?”

“Rarely you show filial piety, then go ahead,” Shen Muyan stretched her long legs as much as possible, settling into a comfortable position.

Lu Xiyao obediently climbed onto the sofa and started massaging with her chubby, tender hands.

Crack, crack.

The little one was very serious, using all her strength to press, as if nursing. It felt pretty good.

The rich mom closed her eyes and enjoyed it. Ten minutes later.

The little one finished and declared, “Hmm~!”

The rich mom stretched lazily and thought that having a daughter was really great.

“Mom~! I’m done~!”

The little one blinked her eyes.

“Mm, Yaoyao is really good, keep it up.”

“Mom~! I’m done~!”

The little one blinked again, showing an expectant look. Shen Muyan glanced at the little one and seemed to understand something. She raised an eyebrow.

“What do you want?”

“Hehe~! Three ice creams~!”

“Nice try, just one.”

Lu Xiyao tilted her head and thought for a moment before nodding.

“Alright~! Mom, there are still two ice creams left from last time, now I owe you three~!”

Shen Muyan was stunned, almost forgetting about the ice cream from before. She glanced at the little one. The ice cream thing, she remembered it very clearly. If she forgot, her daughter wouldn’t. Dinner was ready.

The main dish was spicy stir-fried pork intestines, and both Shen Muyan and Lu Xiyao’s appetites were immediately awakened. They washed their hands and ate.

Xiaomi, the boss lady’s favorite employee, stayed to eat with them. It was fatty but not greasy, lean but not dry, with a strong and spicy flavor that lingered. Shen Muyan wasn’t really fond of offal, especially pork intestines, but this dish, made by Boss Lu, was really delicious.

There was no unpleasant taste of the intestines at all. After two big bowls of rice, Shen Muyan rubbed her bloated stomach, already feeling full. Lu Xiyao was the same, completely stuffed.

After everyone finished eating, Xiaomi started cleaning up the dishes. Lu Qin went into the kitchen to prepare the late-night snack for the stall.

Shen Muyan played a puzzle game with the little one for a while when suddenly Lu Qin’s phone vibrated on the coffee table.

Who was looking for Boss Lu at night?

The rich mom was curious, but it was impolite to sneak a look at someone else’s phone. She stared at the phone screen for a while but resisted touching it.

At this moment, the little one’s tablet ran out of power. She plugged it in and then took Lu Qin’s phone to continue watching cartoons. The phone vibrated again.

Lu Xiyao clicked it, and the WeChat chat interface popped up. Shen Muyan squinted her eyes. It was a woman. Her name was Chen Yue.

The little one had no interest in the WeChat chat. She skillfully swiped it away and went back to watching cartoons.

“Yaoyao, give me the phone.”

“Mom, I want to watch cartoons.”

“Use Mom’s phone to watch.”

“Okay~!”

The innocent little one directly exchanged phones with Shen Muyan.

Shen Muyan took Lu Qin’s phone, swiped around for a while, then stood up and walked towards the kitchen. She leaned against the sliding door, her stunning figure perfectly sculpted.

The rich mom calmly said to Lu Qin, who was busy in the kitchen, “The little one took your phone to watch cartoons. I noticed someone important was looking for you. Don’t you want to reply?”

Lu Qin turned his head, glanced at the rich mom, then leaned closer to look at the phone and said, “It’s not anyone important, just leave it.”

The rich mom had casually swiped through the messages. This Chen Yue had been texting Lu Qin every few days. Sometimes Boss Lu would reply politely, other times he wouldn’t reply at all. But Chen Yue still persisted, clearly with a purpose.

Shen Muyan squinted her eyes.

“Boss Lu’s market seems pretty good?”

Noticing a hint of jealousy in her tone, Lu Qin smiled slightly.

“It’s alright.”

The rich woman glanced coldly at Lu Qin.

“You’re kneading dough with both hands, do you want me to help you reply?”

Lu Qin looked at her with interest and said, “Sure.”

Lu Qin originally thought that Chen Yue would give up due to his cold attitude, but she surprisingly persisted. It seemed like he needed to put an end to this once and for all.

Lu Qin didn’t mind letting the rich woman handle it for him.

“What should I reply?” The rich woman asked.

“Anything,” Lu Qin replied, turning back to continue kneading the dough.

The rich woman pursed her red lips. Since that’s the case, she decided to make a subtle move. Her long fingers pressed on the voice message button, and her lazy, pleasant yet slightly cold voice said, “He’s taking a shower.”

Just four simple words, and it was a knockout move. Sure enough, Chen Yue did not respond for several minutes. The rich woman smiled faintly, mission accomplished.

On the other end, Chen Yue was stunned after listening to the voice message. She quickly looked down, her expression dimming. It was completely hopeless now.

Over the past few days, she had been actively texting Lu Qin. But the boss had remained indifferent, clearly showing he had no interest in her. These days, Chen Yue had compared many men to Lu Qin and found that he was superior in every way. So, she had kept trying, not willing to give up. But now, she could finally give up for good.

With a woman’s sixth sense, Chen Yue could tell from the voice that the woman on the other side was beautiful, confident, and right by Lu Qin’s side. So, there was no hope for her. After all, forced relationships aren’t sweet.

Moreover, Lu Qin had never properly responded to her. Now, she could report back to her father, Chen Dahai, that it was over. But it was really a pity. She hadn’t been able to win over a man like Lu Qin. She might never meet someone so perfect and excellent again.

Shen Muyan placed her phone on the coffee table, sat down, and watched a cartoon with the little one. Then, she stood up, grabbed a portion of crystal shrimp dumplings and Boss Oil Cake, and prepared to leave.

“If I don’t leave now, the strategist Fang Ya will starve to death.”

“Mom, are you leaving?”

“Don’t you want to sleep with Yaoyao tonight?”

The little one didn’t want to sleep alone. She slept better when she was with either Lu Qin or Shen Muyan. But ever since the little one started kindergarten, Lu Qin had insisted she sleep independently.

If Shen Muyan stayed, the little one would naturally sleep with her. Lu Qin, after finishing kneading the dough, came out of the kitchen. Seeing Shen Muyan standing at the entrance with things in her hands, he asked, “Are you leaving?”

The rich woman spoke coldly, “I’m going to bring Fang Ya some food. I’ll be back soon.”

“Oh.”

Lu Qin glanced at her without showing much emotion.

Shen Muyan couldn’t tell what Lu Qin was feeling and asked, “Should I pay for the accommodation, Boss Lu?”

“No need.”

The rich woman stayed behind to accompany the little one to sleep. Lu Qin agreed, thinking the companionship was quite nice. Shen Muyan drove to Fang Ya’s place.

“Hurry up, I’m starving!”

As soon as Shen Muyan entered, still changing into her slippers, Fang Ya rushed over and grabbed the food from her hands.

“So this is Boss Oil Cake? Mmm… so delicious!”

Fang Ya was wearing pajamas, hadn’t tidied herself up, and had a messy bun. She kept stuffing the crystal shrimp dumplings and Boss Oil Cake into her mouth. She swallowed slowly and then took a good look at Shen Muyan.

“Today’s outfit is really nice. If I were a man, I’d be totally smitten!”

Fang Ya spoke honestly, then continued eating.

“What was his reaction?”

Shen Muyan shook her head.

“Normal reaction.”

“A normal reaction would be to throw you down,” Fang Ya said and chewed on the shrimp dumpling. “Where’s the mung bean soup? Next time, you have to bring a drink!”

“Having food is enough. Do you think this is a restaurant?” Shen Muyan replied impatiently.

“You think Lu Qin is a man who thinks with his lower body?”

“NONONO!”

Fang Ya shook her finger.

“All men think with their lower body. It’s just that your Lu Qin has an incredibly strong self-control. His level is high, looks like this situation can’t be rushed.”

“So what should we do next?” Shen Muyan asked.

“Well… there are too few crystal shrimp dumplings. Bring more next time, I need physical and mental energy to think!”

Fang Ya finished both portions, feeling about 80% full. When eating Boss Lu’s food, she felt twelve times full at the least. Anything less was unsatisfying!

“Time will tell… feelings will develop,” Fang Ya said with a knowing smile.

“In this process, use the thirty-six tactics to snare men,” she added.

Shen Muyan frowned.

“How exactly should I do it?”

“Cough, cough… hmm, I still need to sort out my thoughts. I’ll tell you later.”

Fang Ya, the strategist, still hadn’t fully figured out her plan… Ah, no, she hadn’t come up with the complete strategy yet. This needed time.

While Fang Ya went to pour some water, Shen Muyan pulled out a book from between the sofa cushions.

“Guide to Winning the Heart of a Male God?”

“You said ‘later.’ Does that mean you’ll finish reading this guide first?”

Shen Muyan felt she had made a mistake by asking Fang Ya for advice. After all, she was still single herself—why not use her own tricks?

Fang Ya, exposing her flaw, wasn’t flustered at all. She took a sip of water and casually said, “You have to trust me, I’m experienced. Although I’ve never been married, I’ve been in two relationships. I have more experience than you.”

Shen Muyan chuckled, “My kid could be making soy sauce by now.”

“NONONO!” Fang Ya said and shook her finger. “Have you ever dated Lu Qin? Not at all? Don’t forget, you two got married because of the baby, and afterward, you’ve been so busy with work that your relationship is practically a blank sheet. So, you must listen to me!”

Shen Muyan didn’t respond. When it came to winning Lu Qin’s heart, she really had no clue what to do. In other words, she had absolutely no idea how to approach it.

Fang Ya wasn’t wrong in this case. Shen Muyan sighed in her heart. For now, she would go along with Fang Ya’s plan. If things went badly, she would fire her.

chapters.title: Chapter 190
chapters.content:
Chapter 190 “She’s not a person, she’s a Labrador with thick fur!”

Boss Lu, do you want to join in?

Under normal circumstances, these wouldn’t be Shen Muyan’s words. But right now, they genuinely slipped out from her slightly pouting red lips.

Unusual actions often signal something was wrong. Something was off about her. The strings in Boss Lu’s heart were plucked, causing a stir. His throat suddenly felt dry. That one dramatic glance, her stunning yet pure face, and her enchanting body that exuded charm almost overwhelmed him.

Lu Qin’s toes subconsciously inched forward.

Join in? Kiss? Come to me?

Lu Xiyao’s eyes lit up, her expression filled with excitement.

“Brushing together sounds great! It’s fun! Daddy always gives me a back rub, it feels so good!”

“ Hmph! Nice try!”

Shen Muyan saw the slight stirrings of interest on Lu Qin’s face and knew her plan had succeeded. She cut the line short.

You want to bite, but I won’t bait you.

She gave a look that said, You handle it yourself, and dragged the little one into the bathroom, shutting the door behind her.

Boss Lu scratched his nose, laughing bitterly, thinking the rich woman must have learned this from somewhere. She used to be completely unrelated to the term ‘flirting.’

Lu Qin quickly swept the floor, sat on the couch, and drank some water. Soon, the bathroom door opened. A fresh scent of body wash wafted out.

Lu Xiyao, wearing cartoon pajamas and slippers, her hair still wet, ran to the living room and clung to Lu Qin’s arm, acting coquettish.

“Daddy, I’m all done, smell! Do I smell good?”

“Mm, it smells really good.”

Lu Qin pinched her soft cheek, like peeling a boiled egg, smooth and tender.

“Your hair’s still wet, let me blow dry it for you.”

“Okay~!”

As soon as Lu Qin stood up and turned, he saw Shen Muyan. He froze. He raised an eyebrow. The sight of a goddess coming out of the bath was both beautiful and tempting.

The rich woman had actually brought her own pajamas into his house and put them on in front of him?

She wore a thin lace camisole, with two slender straps casually hanging over her fair shoulders, as if they could easily slide off. Her full bosom and deep cleavage were a sight to behold. The captivating scenery drew Boss Lu in. His throat went dry again.

This woman!

What’s she playing at, dressing like this?

He was a gentleman. Shen Muyan had a cold expression, her face graceful. She naturally brushed past Boss Lu, heading for the water. Everything seemed normal.

There was a glass of lemonade on the coffee table, and the rich woman casually picked it up and took a sip.

“This glass of water is mine,” Lu Qin reminded.

“So what?”

The rich woman replied indifferently.

Is this really your line?

Lu Qin felt a little invaded. He grabbed the blow dryer to dry the little one’s hair. Once the little one’s hair was dry, she quickly ran to her room to lie down.

“Help me dry my hair.”

Shen Muyan spoke coldly, her expression one of entitlement.

“You can do it yourself.”

Lu Qin handed her the blow dryer. It wouldn’t be a big deal to help, but when the rich woman turned around…

Wow!

Her back was almost entirely exposed, with only a few thin straps criss crossing over it. Her skin, white as jade, was so smooth that it was blinding.

Referee, this woman is playing foul!

“Thank you,” the rich woman politely said, then turned around.

This hair wasn’t going to dry itself. Lu Qin muttered a mantra to himself while drying her hair, all the while thinking that she wasn’t human—she was a Labrador with thick fur.

During the process, his fingers unintentionally brushed against the smooth, delicate skin on her back. Both of their breaths became shallow, but the sound of the blow dryer masked it.

Shen Muyan, despite being the one who initiated the flirtation, found herself feeling the same intense sensations. It was a case of “hurting others while hurting yourself.”

After drying her hair, the rich woman’s delicate, white ears felt hot.

“All done.”

Lu Qin pulled the plug on the blow dryer, his throat parched, and took a sip of water. After he put it down, he realized it was the same glass of water he had drunk from, then Shen Muyan had drunk from it, and now he was drinking from it again.

Wonderful.

Saliva exchanged repeatedly.

In other words, repeated indirect kisses!

Shen Muyan noticed this too. She glanced at the glass of lemonade, her face turning even redder.

In a barely audible voice, she muttered, “Go to sleep early,” then walked back to her room, her slippers tapping lightly on the floor. Lu Qin stood up and went to take a cold shower to cool off.

The world of adults is so easy to spark—dangerous. From not daring to face Boss Lu at first to now casually coming over to “mooch” meals.

Though it was in the name of being the child’s mother, that wasn’t the main reason. She wanted to eat Boss Lu’s food and see him. That was the truth.

At first, she refused to admit it, but now she had clear goals. At some point, Shen Muyan had developed thoughts about the father and daughter. These thoughts made her rarely put work first.

As for Boss Lu?

He didn’t mind the rich woman’s behavior. At least it showed that he had developed some affection for her. If he didn’t feel anything for her, they wouldn’t be at the point where Shen Muyan had regular visits.

The rich woman was slowly but surely making her way into Lu Qin’s heart, and he knew it but didn’t stop her. The plot seemed to be developing according to the Red Thread of Fate. Lu Qin lay on his bed, checking the system.

With 1700 points, he had one high-level draw left, but he couldn’t be bothered. He closed his eyes and went to sleep. Later in the night, Lu Qin woke up. Maybe it was because he drank too much lemonade, but he got up to use the bathroom.

Then, naturally, he gently pushed open the door to the little one’s room to check if she had kicked off her blanket. But to his surprise, there was a delicate, well-formed body lying there.

In the dim light, Lu Qin squinted and saw that the little one hadn’t kicked off her blanket, the thin air conditioning blanket snugly covering her. But beside her, the rich woman had only covered her stomach.

Two white arms and a pair of smooth jade-like legs were casually placed in the air. Her delicate, jade-like skin seemed to hypnotize in the dim light. Lu Qin quietly walked over and gently pulled the blanket to cover her.

Shen Muyan’s sleep was always light, and feeling the slight pressure on her body, she slowly woke up. She opened her eyes slightly.

In front of her, she saw a familiar figure gently tucking the blanket in for her. His movements were careful, as though taking care of a fragile flower. The warm breath from the man brushed her neck, making her heart race.

Perhaps to avoid the man hearing her quickening heartbeat, she pretended to turn over. She rolled over, her back now facing him, and continued to sleep.

Lu Qin frowned slightly. The rich woman’s position was facing the air conditioning vent, and though the temperature was set to 27 degrees with low fan speed, there was still a risk of catching a cold if she didn’t cover herself.

Lu Qin carefully pulled the blanket back and re-covered her. Since her legs were on top of the blanket, Lu Qin used one hand to support her legs and the other to pull the blanket up.

The smooth feeling under his hand made his breath hitch. Shen Muyan’s cheeks flushed slightly. Fortunately, the lights were off. Just as Lu Qin was about to turn around and leave, the rich woman unexpectedly turned over again. The blanket slipped off once more.

Lu Qin sighed inwardly. How restless was this woman?

He returned, re-covered the blanket again, and tucked her white arms under it. Barely a few seconds later, she moved again. Lu Qin frowned. His gaze shifted to her. Under the dim light, Shen Muyan had her eyes closed, but her long, curly eyelashes trembled slightly, and her eyes were constantly moving. She wasn’t dreaming. She was awake!

Feigning sleep?

Your acting skills are terrible!

Boss Lu was angry.

Slap!

A slap landed on the rich woman’s round, smooth back.

chapters.title: Chapter 191
chapters.content:
Chapter 191 The high and low need to teach the Lotus District a lesson!

Unexpectedly, the rich woman felt the tingling and fiery sensation coming from behind her, almost crying out loud. Thankfully, she didn’t shout. Shen Muyan tightly bit her red lip. Her ears were already flushed.

Still moving around?

Naughty!

Lu Qin quickly pulled the quilt back and covered her again. The rich woman behaved obediently, no longer daring to move. Lu Qin exited the room.

_____

The next day, Shen Muyan woke up at six o’clock. She had been slightly nudged on her soft hips in the middle of the night, and couldn’t fall back asleep after that. The entire night was a blur, her mind wandering.

The little one next to her was talking in his sleep, mumbling about ice cream 56 times, chicken wings 38 times, milk tea 43 times, asking for a hug 32 times, and six times asking for her to buy ice cream. A foodie’s dream still revolves around food!

Turns out, she was just a tool for buying ice cream. Shen Muyan stretched her jade foot and lightly kicked the little one’s bottom.

No response.

The little one continued to snore beside her.

Shen Muyan quietly got out of bed. The faint sound of activity came from the kitchen as Boss Lu and his employee, Xiao Mi, were preparing food for the early market.

A hardworking man.

Lu Qin saw Shen Muyan standing at the kitchen door, her hair slightly messy, but still irresistibly charming. Hmm, that thin camisole sleep dress was absolutely stunning!

With her lazy posture, she looked like a movie cover, so beautiful it was almost overwhelming.

“You’re up so early?”

Lu Qin handed her a cup of warm water.

“I have an early meeting.”

The rich woman took the cup and sipped. Both of them pretended nothing happened the previous night. Though Shen Muyan could still vaguely feel some tingling sensation at her back. Thinking about it, her face began to heat up, and she quickly turned around to wash up in the bathroom.

____

The morning market was still in the usual spot, at the entrance of Sunshine Primary School. Customers were still everywhere, more crowded than a supermarket sale.

When packing up, a customer asked if they would be at the Lotus District Food Festival in the afternoon.

Lu Qin smiled and said, “The application didn’t pass. Seems like the booths are full.”
