“Lu Boss, please wait a moment. I just need to take a little of your time.”

Lu Qin frowned slightly. She glanced at her watch, already time to pick up her daughter. If it weren’t for Qin Hui being so polite and humble, she would have ignored him.

chapters.title: Chapter 210
chapters.content:
Chapter 210

Xiaomi packed up the small folding stool and put it on the food truck, locked the door, and walked over to Lu Qin’s side, saying, “Boss, should I head back now with the food truck?”

Lu Qin nodded.

“Stop by the farmer’s market on the way and buy some ribs and shrimp. Once you’re home, wash the rice and start cooking, I’ll make the rest when I get back.”

“Okay, Boss.”

Xiaomi followed Lu Qin’s instructions without hesitation, driving the food truck back. Before 5 o’clock, Lu Qin Snack Stall had already closed for the day.

Other snack stall owners were filled with envy and frustration.

“Is he selling wholesale or something?”

Typically, food stalls at a festival will stock up on ingredients, so running out of food is rare. Even if it happens, it’s usually just one or two popular items.

But for Lu Qin to sell out everything on the truck—this was unheard of. No, it’s more accurate to say it’s never happened before.

As the Lu Qin Snack Truck slowly drove away, all eyes—both from customers and fellow vendors—followed it. Customers reluctantly watched, and the stall owners sighed in relief. The “enemy” in the snack stall world was finally leaving.

Qin Hui wiped the sweat from his forehead. Despite his best efforts, Lu Boss still refused to set up in Lianhua District. He could occasionally come, but coming daily was definitely out of the question.

Qin Hui was at his wit’s end. He couldn’t very well prepare a house for him and make him move here, could he? Finally, he opened the door of Lu Qin’s truck and watched helplessly as the stall left.

In the end, Lu Boss only agreed to stay for the food festival, and after it ended, he wouldn’t likely return to Lianhua District to set up again. What frustrated Qin Hui the most was that once the food festival was over, Lu Boss would likely pull a large number of Lianhua District’s customers over to Annan District.

Now, with the convenience of transportation—by car, subway, or bus—the trip from Lianhua District to Annan District was no more than half an hour. It took just 20 minutes without traffic, so it wasn’t far.

For the chance to enjoy Lu Qin’s snacks, that 20-minute trip was worth it. At the entrance of Starlight Kindergarten. A stunning woman in a black business suit and high heels stood there, captivating everyone around her.

Shen Muyan, with her waterfall-like hair cascading down to her shoulders, was tall, with a curvaceous figure. She stood there with an air of elegance, looking incredibly beautiful.

Whether single or married, every father at the kindergarten couldn’t help but glance in her direction. They weren’t thinking anything inappropriate, but simply couldn’t suppress their instinctive admiration for beauty.

“It’s Yao Yao’s mom! She’s so beautiful!”

“She’s got both looks and money, the perfect woman!”

“I’m a woman and even I’m smitten!”

“Those legs—straight as an arrow!”

In just three minutes, five fathers had already been scolded for staring too much. At 5:25 p.m., Lu Qin parked the truck, and he was a little surprised to see the wealthy woman waiting to pick up the little one.

Wasn’t she a workaholic? How did she have time every day?

The two of them stood side by side, a perfect match, causing envy from onlookers. Soon, Lu Xiyao came out. She had already pinned the “Little Boss Lady” badge on her clothes.

When the little one saw Lu Qin and Shen Muyan together, her eyes lit up, and she happily ran toward them, releasing Teacher Li’s hand as she dashed over.

“Boss Lu! Rich Mom!”

Shen Muyan opened her arms, ready to embrace her. But Lu Xiyao had already thrown herself into Lu Qin’s arms. Shen Muyan pinched the little one’s soft cheek and didn’t let go.

“It hurts, Mommy!”

“Come here, give me a kiss.”

“Okay!”

The little one kissed Lu Qin first, then ran to Shen Muyan’s arms and kissed her wealthy mother. In the little one’s heart, the family ranking remained unchanged.

First was Lu Qin, second was herself, and third was wealthy Mommy. If they got a dog or cat later, Shen Muyan would drop to fourth. She never said this aloud, of course.

If she did, wealthy Mommy would definitely have a few words for her. Shen Muyan slid into the backseat of the car and stretched her long legs—longer than Lu Boss’s life—on the footrest, trying to stay as comfortable as possible.

She didn’t drive. After arriving at the kindergarten, she had the driver leave and waited for Lu Qin. When he arrived, she could hitch a ride with him, and maybe even grab a meal. If possible, she might even hitch a ride from others.

“Daddy, are we going home? Aren’t we going to the food stall anymore?”

The little one realized Lu Qin was not headed in the right direction.

“Yao Yao, everything’s sold out. Today’s done,” Lu Qin explained.

“But Daddy, can we make some more food and go sell it? I haven’t been the Little Boss Lady today!”

The little one looked at him with a bright, hopeful expression. She had already hung her badge, and now he was saying it was over. She was so disappointed!

“We’re taking a break today. Daddy will play checkers with you at home,” Lu Qin said.

“But I still want to be the Little Boss Lady!”

Lu Qin sighed, realizing there was no reasoning with her.

“Daddy, please?”

The little one blinked her big eyes and gave a little pout.

Shen Muyan, enjoying the seat massage with her eyes closed, said, “Stop whining. Stay at home and be good tonight.”

The little one turned her head and, with a serious tone, said to Shen Muyan, who was resting with her eyes closed:

“I! Want! To! Be! The! Little! Boss! Lady!”

The tone! She was getting bolder!

Shen Muyan opened her eyes, staring coldly at her.

“Say that again?”

“I! Want! To! Be! The! Little! Boss! Lady!”

The little one’s rebellious side seemed to have gained some weight. Shen Muyan, using her CEO persona, brought out a tenth of the coldness she used in the office, directing it toward the little one.

Once she rested her legs back on the footrest and resumed enjoying her massage, the little one stood tearfully in the backseat, holding onto the chair.

Lu Qin, keeping his focus on driving, paid no attention to their exchange. Although he was a “daughter’s slave,” some things had to be taught in moderation. He couldn’t let the little one get away with everything. This would do her good in the long run.

When she grew up and entered society, she’d learn that the world wasn’t going to give in to her every whim. Lu Qin hated to see her cry, but Shen Muyan didn’t mind. As a woman, it wasn’t wrong to give a little hard love.

The little one looked at Lu Qin for help. But then Shen Muyan spoke coldly, “Stop looking around. Don’t wander, stand up properly.”

The little one whimpered.

After “punishing” the little one for five minutes, Shen Muyan finished her massage and gave the little one a sweet reward.

“Alright, stop crying. Say ‘I know I was wrong,’ and I’ll forgive you.”

The little one, with a pout, remained silent.

“Well? Still haven’t realized your mistake?” Shen Muyan raised an eyebrow.

“ Ugh… You’ve got me cornered, how could I not know my mistake~!”

Shen Muyan’s face broke into a smile.

This little one—she was admitting her mistake, but still with the last bit of stubbornness!

chapters.title: Chapter 211
chapters.content:
Chapter 211

The little cutie from the Lu family was crying pitifully. But at least there was no need for punishment or holding onto the back of a chair anymore.

She glanced at Lu Qin’s back of the head with a pitiful expression, as if saying, Your little cutie was bullied, and you didn’t even comfort me?

However, Mr. Lu was focused on driving and seemed to truly not notice.

Shen Muyan glanced at the little one and said, “Enough, you’re no longer a three-year-old, crying for three minutes is enough, crying more won’t help.”

Look, she’s speaking the truth.

The little one blinked her big eyes and just stared at the wealthy woman, her tears not yet dried.

“Mom, with such a beautiful mouth, how can you say such cold words?”

“How about when we get home, I’ll get you an ice cream, would you like vanilla flavor?”

Pfft!

Finally, the little one couldn’t hold back anymore and broke into a smile. But in the process, she accidentally blew a snot bubble out of her nose. Shen Muyan’s smile couldn’t be contained as she handed over a tissue.

“ Ugh! Hurry up and wipe it, so untidy.”

“Hehe~!”

The little one was now only thinking about the ice cream. The Lu family’s little cutie was fairly easy to coax, just an ice cream did the trick. When they arrived home, Xiaomi had already prepared the dinner ingredients, cutting and seasoning everything, just waiting for Chef Lu to get to work.

Lu Qin tied on the “Food God” apron and entered the kitchen. Xiaomi went to the small courtyard and started wiping the snack cart.

“Xiaomi, would you like some ice cream?”

Lu Xiyao skillfully opened the fridge door.

The ice cream was in the second drawer of the freezer, just within her reach.

“No, Miss Yao, I don’t eat ice cream,” Xiaomi said and shook her head and went to clean the cart in the small courtyard.

At that moment, Shen Muyan walked over with long legs.

Lu Xiyao looked up at her.

“Mom, Xiaomi doesn’t want ice cream. Should I eat it for her instead?”

Shen Muyan raised her elegant eyebrows slightly.

“If you’re going to force yourself, then don’t eat it.”

“Oh, okay.”

Lu Xiyao didn’t dare to push it further, afraid of being scolded by the wealthy woman. She took two ice creams, one vanilla and one cantaloupe flavor. The beautiful woman and the little one sat on the sofa in the living room eating ice cream.

“Mom, does the cantaloupe flavor taste good?”

“No, it doesn’t.”

The little one paused, and she didn’t dare to ask for a bite.

“Does your vanilla flavor taste good?”

“Mine’s also not good,” the little one mimicked her.

“Since it’s not good, let me help you finish some of it.”

Shen Muyan quickly lowered her head and took a bite. The little one wanted to protect her ice cream, but it was too late. She looked at the ice cream with a big bite missing, it felt like a wound to her heart. Although the wealthy woman’s mouth was beautiful, at this moment, the little one hated it.

“Mom, let me help you finish some too.”

The little one leaned forward and wanted to take a bite, but the wealthy woman pressed her head down.

…

After finishing the ice cream, soon the dinner was ready. It was very sumptuous. The little one was hungry and greedy.

“Wow, my favorite garlic ribs.”

“Wow, my favorite spicy prawns.”

“Wow, my favorite golden egg custard.”

“Wow…”

Lu Xiyao opened her mouth and was fed a garlic clove.

“Don’t spit it out, eat it.”

Shen Muyan said coldly, in a commanding tone.

The little one stopped complaining. The garlic clove was taken from the garlic ribs and was quite tasty. However, the little one preferred the meat more.

The family of three, plus Xiaomi, conducted the “clean plate” campaign. The food was all gone. Xiaomi washed the dishes.

In the peaceful evening, the three played checkers. The loser would get a sticker. Playing checkers helped the little one develop decision-making skills and focus.

An hour later, the little one was covered in stickers and looked like a little ghost. The wealthy woman, who had an IQ of 180, also got five or six stickers. She wasn’t happy about it.

Why is Lu Qin so good at checkers?

The little one’s fair hands removed the stickers, revealing her big, bright eyes, looking at Lu Qin as if saying.

Dad, is it really appropriate to put all these stickers on your little cutie?

Lu Qin smirked, pulled out his phone, and took several photos of the “little ghost” covered in stickers. The wealthy woman, also with stickers on her, was photographed too. This really ruined her image.

The wealthy woman demanded that the photos be deleted. She transferred a 200 yuan red envelope to Lu Qin and demanded an immediate deletion.

Seeing the money, Lu Qin opened the album and deleted the photos in front of her. Only then did the wealthy woman feel at ease. However, even with stickers all over her, she still looked beautiful—such a deadly charm and beauty. If only she hadn’t deleted them.

Unbeknownst to her, the photos had already been automatically uploaded to the cloud album, so deleting them locally didn’t help. Boss Lu silently made 200 yuan.

“No driving tonight, I’ll stay here and sleep.”

Shen Muyan removed the sticker from her face, stood up, and stretched her waist, revealing her alluring waistline.

Lu Qin smiled.

“Don’t sleepwalk tonight.”

Shen Muyan’s fair cheeks blushed with two red spots. She pretended not to understand what Lu Qin meant. The little one clapped her hands happily.

“With the wealthy woman staying the night, how great.”

Tonight, Lu Qin didn’t receive any secret photos from Shen Muyan, but instead, it was a real-life temptation. After taking a bath, the wealthy woman came out with wet long hair, walking confidently, not caring about Lu Qin.

She wore a light green spaghetti strap ice silk sleepwear, with a V-neck top revealing half her back, and shorts showing her jade-like legs swaying. She bent over to blow-dry her hair.

Unstoppable charm.

Lu Qin couldn’t take it, so he closed his eyes and recited a calming mantra to clear his mind. Shen Muyan caught a glimpse of Lu Qin’s embarrassed expression and felt quite pleased inside.

Did I mesmerize you?

With the help of her strategist Fang Ya, the cold and aloof Shen goddess was gradually becoming a little bad with Lu Qin.

…

Lu Qin, after taking a shower and returning to the room, opened WeChat and Alipay to check his balance. At times like this, he always felt a rush of excitement. Today’s income was 143,700, and after deducting costs, the profit was about 130,000.

Lu Qin’s savings had reached over 1.35 million. A three-bedroom apartment in Jiangcheng generally costs around 2 million. Thanks to his street vending business, Lu Qin had earned more than half the amount needed for a house. However, his savings were still far from enough.

Not only did he need to buy a house, but he also needed to save for his little one’s schooling fees, her dowry, and more. Lu Qin still had many dishes to add to his top-level Sichuan cuisine skills, and there were many dishes he hadn’t sold yet.

To increase sales, he needed to customize a different daily menu. Fried rice noodles could be sold daily as a staple, along with three kinds of cakes, such as ice crystal cakes, lotus flower pastries, and crystal shrimp dumplings, and three kinds of stir-fried dishes.

By reducing the variety of dishes, the same preparation time could be used to increase the quantity. After making this decision, Lu Qin opened his phone and found the WeChat of the advertising shop owner. He bought an intelligent electronic display screen.

There were two types—a stand-alone version and a wall-mounted version, mostly used in milk tea shops. After inquiring, the shop owner quoted a price. The stand-alone version was cheaper but needed a USB to modify the content, which was inconvenient.

The network version was more expensive but could be controlled remotely via a phone. Lu Qin naturally chose the network version, a 21-inch screen for 750 yuan. He compared prices on online stores, but the difference wasn’t much.

Online shopping would take at least three days, and returning or repairing faulty items would be a hassle, so Lu Qin directly ordered it from the ad shop. It would be ready for pickup by noon tomorrow.

Before going to bed, Lu Qin checked his system points. He had reached 5224. He could now make five high-level draws.

chapters.title: Chapter 212
chapters.content:
Chapter 212

【Consume 1000 points, advanced lottery wins ‘Lock-Fresh Thermobox (Medium)’】

【Consume 1000 points, advanced lottery wins ‘Max-Level Multi-Flavor Ice Cream Making Skills’】

【Consume 1000 points, advanced lottery wins ‘1000g of Gastrointestinal Health Tea’】

【Consume 1000 points, advanced lottery wins ‘Elegant Multi-Functional Kitchen Knife’】

【Consume 1000 points, advanced lottery wins ‘Super Cool Small Umbrella’ (10-pack)】

Lu Qin: “???”

The lottery was going so well, the rewards were great, but the last one seems a bit off-track.

What does a small umbrella have to do with street vending and cooking?

Just how “cool” can it be?

Lu Qin had three black lines on his forehead. Still, he took everything out of the system. He casually placed the neatly packaged, colorful small umbrellas in the nightstand. The Gastrointestinal Health Tea was a good product, Lu Qin read the instructions on the back.

This tea is suitable for people of all ages, slightly sweet, and can be brewed and consumed at any time of the day to improve and protect gastrointestinal function with noticeable effects.

If this were any other health tea on the market, phrases like “improve and protect” and “noticeable effects” would surely raise suspicion.

People who are knowledgeable about health products know that expensive ones are really just that—expensive. They don’t really have any effect, and though they won’t harm you, they don’t really help either. Many health products use word games to confuse people, making it difficult to pursue legal action.

Yet, these deceitful products are still widely bought, with elderly people willingly spending their pension money on them and even scolding their children if they don’t let them. This is the “intelligence tax,” the “pity tax” fully charged.

However, the system’s health tea is real—effective, more potent than medicine, and without side effects. It’s just two kilograms, but that’s enough for the family to drink for two to three months.

Lu Qin’s food and snacks were usually over-consumed by the wealthy woman and the little one, but it was hard to stop them from overeating. Now with the gastrointestinal health tea, he didn’t need to worry anymore.

The Lock-Fresh Thermobox (Medium) was twice the size. Lu Qin lifted it, and it was indeed much lighter. But once filled with food, it would definitely get heavy. Xiaomi would probably struggle to carry it alone—he’d have to help.

The Elegant Kitchen Knife was light in hand, suitable for cutting vegetables and chopping bones, and could even resist bacteria. Its sharpness was no exaggeration—literally could cut through hair. The Max-Level Multi-Flavor Ice Cream Making Skills obtained from this advanced lottery draw was definitely a godsend for the little one!

Why do adults always focus on kids eating ice cream and such foods?

First, it’s not good for the stomach and intestines if consumed excessively. Second, the additives in ice cream last longer than the human lifespan, and just recently, it was revealed that some ice creams were found to contain fecal contamination—completely shocking!

Now that they could make their own ice cream, they could rest easy. Before going to bed, Lu Qin posted an announcement in his WeChat group. The morning market would still be in front of Sunshine Primary School tomorrow.

Once Lu Qin made an appearance, the foodies in the group started drooling, each one eager to lick the pot covers and steam baskets from Lu Qin’s home.

There were over 1600 members in the group, with more than 1000 active participants, making it a large customer base. As long as he set up a stall in Jiangcheng, there would always be customers. Even if he went to another city, some foodies would drive hundreds of kilometers just to follow him.

After a lifetime of struggles, shouldn’t he be able to enjoy some good food?

The next morning, Xiaomi had already bought the ingredients on her three-wheeled vehicle, bringing in large and small bags into the yard to start preparing for the morning market.

Lu Qin went to brush his teeth and wash his face. He didn’t need to check the bills, he could fully trust Xiaomi.

Click!

Shen Muyan sleepily walked in. It was only 5:30 am, not her usual wake-up time, so the door to the bathroom was left open. She walked in and stood behind Lu Qin…

It seemed like… she was waiting to use the bathroom too!

“Are you done?”

After waiting for a while, Shen Muyan grew impatient. She might be a little urgent.

“All done,” Lu Qin said and hurriedly finished up and flushed the toilet.

He turned around awkwardly and gave Shen Muyan an odd look. Although he had his back to her and she couldn’t see anything, she could still hear the sounds, which was awkward.

Shouldn’t she have immediately turned around and left when she saw someone in the bathroom?

Why did she walk in so casually?

Did she not consider herself a stranger?

Shen Muyan pushed past Lu Qin and turned to enter the bathroom.

Lu Qin was still watching, curious to see if she would take her pants off in front of him.

Lu Qin wasn’t trying to watch, he was just curious…

“Get out.”

As Shen Muyan bent down to pull up her pajama shorts, she noticed Lu Qin staring at her, and immediately frowned.

“Do you want to watch?”

Lu Qin quickly came to his senses and hurriedly walked out of the bathroom. Well, she was still somewhat normal. However, Lu Qin felt a bit wronged—after all, he was in the middle of his business, and she didn’t leave.

…

The morning market was still bustling. Three groups of customers came from Lianhua District, but because they didn’t arrive early, they had to wait in a long line, and many didn’t get anything. They had wasted time and were left hungry, feeling miserable.

In the end, the Sunshine Baozi Shop owner benefited. Though their buns weren’t particularly tasty, they could still fill the stomach. At noon, Lu Qin went to the ad shop to pick up the electronic LCD screen, wall-mounted, plug and play.

It had Bluetooth to connect to the phone. By loading images or PPT into a specific app, he could display content on the screen. He also had the ad shop’s designer help him design a menu price list, free of charge. They used a template from a milk tea shop, and it was done in ten minutes.

He received the version on his phone, and he could change it at any time. The old whiteboard wasn’t thrown away either, it could still be used for some warm tips like “Mint candies are free, but please don’t bulk buy,” “Excessive eating is not recommended, but digestion tablets are available,” and “Do not feed the little boss’s wife.”

Lu Qin’s handwriting was nice, standard regular script, and his seal script was also beautiful. The handwritten signs gave a more human touch.

Just as Lu Qin was about to cook lunch, Shen Muyan arrived in her dazzling red Porsche. Lu Qin thought she was coming to mooch a meal, but it turned out she was inviting him for a meal. It would be at the Jiangcheng Grand Hotel, a very high-class place.

Jiangcheng Grand Hotel often hosted important guests, and the food was top-notch. But compared to the food Lu Qin cooked, there was still a noticeable difference. The meal was hosted by Director Nie Guoqiang from the China Merchants Bureau. Lu Qin thought he was inviting Shen Muyan, and he was just tagging along.

But Director Nie was extremely polite and warm to Lu Qin, leaving him quite confused. After the meal, Shen Muyan took Lu Qin and said their goodbyes.

Director Nie, with his heart finally at ease, was able to make sure Lu Qin wouldn’t leave the An’nan district. Now, he could confidently negotiate with the investors coming from Kyoto.

chapters.title: Chapter 213
chapters.content:
Chapter 213

In Jiangcheng, between districts, a commercial food street project worth over 200 million yuan finally landed in the An’nan District. The news quickly spread. Nie Guoqiang’s smile almost reached his ears. This was absolutely a counterattack, but An’nan District didn’t really put in much effort. It was all due to luck.

The key person, Boss Lu, was from An’nan District. Since the investors were specifically attracted to Lu Qin’s snack stall, the outcome was already decided.

Nie Guoqiang even called the leaders of Lianhua District, offering polite greetings while secretly mocking them. The people over at Lianhua District almost slammed the phone down, angrily cursing Nie Guoqiang for having incredible luck.

It was Lianhua District’s fault for not having a popular stall like Lu Qin’s that could attract those investors from Kyoto. Otherwise, An’nan District wouldn’t have had a chance!

After inviting Lu Qin and Shen Muyan for dinner, Nie Guoqiang went on to contact those investors from Kyoto. But they were all standing in line at Lu Qin’s snack stall, buying snacks. Before heading out for the afternoon shift, Lu Qin installed the electronic menu display screen on the top right corner of his snack cart. A 21-inch large screen, visible to all customers unless they had poor eyesight.

Today’s menu featured garlic pork, boiled fish fillets, and Kung Pao chicken. Prices were 36 yuan, 28 yuan, and 30 yuan, with meat portions ranging from 150g to 250g. There were also some pastries—ice crystal cake, crystal shrimp dumplings, and Bo Si oil cakes.

Additionally, there were cold mung bean soup, osmanthus oolong milk tea, pickled vegetables, and spicy chicken feet. Three Lock-Fresh Thermoboxes, five foam insulation boxes, and eight regular plastic storage boxes were packed full with ingredients.

Lu Qin thought Xiaomi might struggle to carry the heavy items, but her small arms managed to lift the heaviest medium-sized Lock-Fresh Thermobox with ease.

At 140L capacity, when filled with food, it weighed around 80-90 kg, yet Xiaomi moved it onto the cart without breaking a sweat. At 3:30 pm, with the sun getting stronger, Lu Qin took a break and went to buy an ice cream machine—a fully automatic, 12L capacity machine.

When he bought the snack cart, it originally had an ice cream machine, but it was small and couldn’t handle the volume of customers at Lu Qin’s stall.

Now, the machine Lu Qin bought had dual compressors, a 304 food-grade stainless steel interior, professional expansion technology, one-button cleaning, quick setting, and 12 levels of hardness adjustment. It was well equipped.

Lu Qin got it through Boss Zhao from a dinnerware shop for 3,300 yuan, which was a great price for such value. Lu Qin had max-level ice cream-making skills, and from his unrivaled experience, he knew that the best-tasting ice cream must be made by hand, 100%. But this wasn’t practical for street vending, so he had to rely on the machine.

Nevertheless, the proportions of ingredients were key. Lu Qin could make ice cream that was far tastier than anything on the market. Even the more expensive Haagen-Dazs was like a little brother compared to this.

Global top-tier ice cream brands like Italy’s LaPerlaGelato, Sweden’s Mövenpick, and Japan’s Sake Brewery Ice Cream couldn’t compare either.

After buying the ice cream machine, Lu Qin also bought ingredients—red beans, mugwort, glutinous rice flour, cream, fermented rice, mint, watermelon, yam, platycodon, and even medicinal herbs.

Lu Qin’s ice cream wasn’t conventional, it was a new type of Chinese-style ice cream, incorporating traditional Chinese medicinal herbs to reduce the coldness of the ice cream and ease the strain on the stomach.

Over an hour later, Lu Qin brought in the ice cream machine. When customers saw it, their eyes immediately lit up.

“Boss Lu, is this an ice cream machine? Are you going to make ice cream?”

“The afternoon heat kicked in, and Boss Lu went right to get an ice cream machine, awww, so thoughtful!”

“Moved! I’ll follow Boss Lu forever!”

“Looking forward to the ice cream, I’m already drooling!”

“Boss Lu is awesome! What flavors are you making? I love avocado!”

The customers also noticed the ingredients Lu Qin had bought, and the bags were bulging. But when the ingredients were taken out, everyone was dumbfounded.

Mint? Glutinous rice flour? Fermented rice?

Yam? Platycodon? Poria cocos?

Is this even for making ice cream?

Amid the confusion, Lu Qin wrote three ice cream flavors on the whiteboard. Red Bean Mugwort, Mint Watermelon, Fragrant Milk Fermented Rice.

Lu Qin smiled and said, “You’ve probably had your fill of Western-style ice cream, with flavors like chocolate, mango, vanilla, and so on. Today, we’re making something different at Lu Qin’s stall—a more Chinese-style ice cream.”

The customers in line immediately reacted.

“Chinese ice cream? That sounds fancy!”

“Red Bean Mugwort? Will it even taste good? Feels like dark cuisine!”

“Platycodon in ice cream? My brain can’t process this!”

“Boss Lu, I think you should just make the common Western flavors. The weird ones might flop.”

“Boss Lu, what if we get a stomach ache from this?”

“I trust Boss Lu, Chinese ice cream will totally outdo Western ice cream!”

Under everyone’s watchful eyes, Lu Qin started making the ice cream.

Grinding, measuring, stirring, whipping, and filtering… Lu Qin’s skilled operation eased the nerves of those customers who were initially skeptical.

“Watching Boss Lu make ice cream looks so professional. I hope it tastes good.”

“Chinese medicine in ice cream… my mouth feels a little bitter.”

“Boss Lu, can I ask why you’re adding Chinese medicine to the ice cream?”

Lu Qin explained, “Some Chinese medicinal ingredients are warming and can counterbalance the coldness of the ice cream, reducing the strain on the stomach.”

“I grind the medicinal herbs into powder, mix them with glutinous rice flour, unsweetened soy milk powder, and other ingredients in specific proportions, replacing the artificial flavoring commonly found in regular ice cream. It’s healthier and tastes better.”

After Lu Qin’s explanation, the customers were shocked.

“Wow, Boss Lu is a true humanitarian! Making ice cream with the intention of reducing the coldness is amazing!”

“Boss Lu’s ice cream has no additives, it’s awesome!”

“But with Chinese medicine, will it really taste good? I hope it’s sweet and not bitter.”

Lu Qin also reminded them.

“Even though the ice cream contains some medicinal herbs, don’t think of it as a health product. It’s just to alleviate some of the coldness that affects the stomach. Eating too much ice cream still isn’t healthy, so please consume in moderation.”

As Lu Qin poured the three ice cream bases into the machine, the customers stared at the machine without blinking. The machine was powerful enough to produce around 500 ice creams an hour. A few minutes later, the ice cream started to take shape.

“I’ll take one red bean mugwort flavor! I’ll try it first!”

“I’ll have a mint watermelon one!”

…

The ice cream cones were specially made, with Lu Qin adding malt syrup instead of white sugar to the egg mixture, and using the highest quality tapioca starch. Through a perfect ratio, the cones made with max-level skills had an excellent texture and taste.

Since time was tight today, Lu Qin didn’t specially buy paper for wrapping the ice cream, so he used the leftover aluminum foil from before.

The foil was cut into 10×10 cm squares, and after wrapping the crispy cone, the machine pressed the ice cream out slowly. Lu Qin looked at it and saw the expansion was perfect, and the shape was fine—everything was working well.

“Here, take it! This is the red bean mugwort one.”

chapters.title: Chapter 214
chapters.content:
Chapter 214

The first three customers, who were the “guinea pigs,” were holding ‘Red Bean Mugwort Ice Cream,’ ‘Mint Watermelon Ice Cream,’ and ‘Fragrant Rice Wine Ice Cream,’ looking nervous without even taking a bite yet.

But honestly, the appearance was quite impressive. The green, red, and milky-white colors looked more inviting than their average ice cream.

However, once they thought about the scene when Boss Lu was making it, the three of them hesitated. After all, there were ingredients like Fuling (Poria) and Jie Geng (Platycodon) involved. Would the taste be too abstract?

Other customers watching them, seeing that they hadn’t taken a bite yet, couldn’t wait any longer.

“Hey, are you going to eat or not?”

“Are you too scared to eat?”

“Trust Boss Lu, it’s definitely delicious!”

“You spent 15 bucks on it, don’t waste it!”

The three “guinea pigs” were forced into it, and reluctantly took a bite.

“Hm!”

“Mmm!”

“Mmmm!”

The taste was surprisingly good, no, it was great!

The three customers’ eyes lit up.

“Why are you just mumbling? Are you pooping or what? How does it taste?”

“Delicious!”

“Honestly, it’s really delicious!”

“It’s delicate and sweet, a taste that’s unique on the tongue!”

The three of them began to eat, savoring each bite.

One of them took several bites, licked their lips, and said, “I’ve had several bites, and it’s not at all greasy. The Red Bean Mugwort flavor is very unique, and the texture is much smoother than regular ice cream. This is amazing!”

“There’s no weird herbal taste?”

“None at all! This Mint Watermelon is incredibly good, the taste is fantastic. I’ve never had ice cream this delicious!”

“This Fragrant Rice Wine Ice Cream is also great. To be honest, it’s ten times better than Haagen-Dazs!”

After hearing the feedback, the customers got excited.

“I knew it! I knew that whatever Boss Lu made would be delicious!”

“Quick, quick! I want one Rice Wine and one Watermelon!”

“Is there a limit? I want all three!”

“I’ll have one Mint Watermelon, and you, honey, want Red Bean Mugwort? Great!”

In no time, Boss Lu’s Chinese-style ice cream was selling like crazy!

It was an unexpectedly hot afternoon with the temperature reaching 32°C, and just walking outdoors for a few minutes left everyone sweating. In such conditions, having an ice cream was incredibly refreshing!

The key was, Boss Lu’s ice cream was so special and delicious, completely different from any ice cream they had ever tasted before. As for the ice cream, Lu Qin had no limit on purchases. Customers could only buy a maximum of three or four at a time, as any more would melt.

In just about twenty minutes, the ice cream mixture was all used up. Lu Qin didn’t keep count, but with three flavors, they had definitely sold over 400.

“Huh? Boss Lu, the ice cream is already sold out? No way, no way!”

“Is this enough for anyone? Boss Lu, don’t you know how many food lovers come to Lu Ji’s stall?”

“Take apart the ice cream machine, I can still lick a few more bites!”

Lu Qin smiled and said, “Please wait a moment, I still have some ingredients, I’ll make more.”

He pulled out the remaining ingredients from behind him. Originally, he had bought enough for two days, but now it seemed like it wouldn’t even last for one.

Lu Qin began to prepare more ice cream mixture and refilled the ice cream machine. The customers started shouting. Lu Qin had originally thought that without a purchase limit, customers wouldn’t buy too much. Firstly, the ice cream would melt, and secondly, no matter how tasty, eating more than two or three would upset their stomachs. But he had underestimated the customers’ appetite for delicious food.

Diarrhea? That’s nothing, just take some medicine later, right?

As long as the mouth and tongue are satisfied, who cares about the stomach troubles? Maybe they’d die tomorrow, and there’d be no one left to regret it.

When good food comes, eat as much as you can!

“Boss Lu, I want two Red Bean Mugwort ones, I love this flavor!”

“I’ll have one of each of the three flavors!”

Lu Qin looked at the customer in front of him as he made the ice cream.

He wasn’t face-blind and said, “Hey, didn’t you already buy three ice creams?”

“Don’t talk nonsense, this is my first time buying! Watch out, I’ll sue you for slander!”

The customer was a bit surprised, then immediately denied it. This customer was a regular, and lying had become second nature. Lu Qin squinted and noticed the ice cream stains at the corner of the customer’s mouth.

He kindly reminded him, “You really shouldn’t eat too much ice cream, it’s not good for your stomach.”

He often used this advice for his daughter, Lu Xiyao.

The customer didn’t appreciate it and snapped, “I’ll eat as much as I want! It’s not like you’re giving it to me for free! Stop nagging!”

The customer grabbed three ice creams and quickly scanned the code to pay, afraid that Lu Qin might put some kind of annoying limit on their purchases.

“Boss Lu, just mind your own business. The issue you should worry about is whether the ice cream will be enough. If it’s not, quickly send that little girl to buy more ingredients!”

Another customer pointed to Xiao Mi. Lu Qin felt that this customer looked familiar.

“You’ve bought more than once, haven’t you?”

“Show me the evidence! I just rushed here from the An’nan district. The engine of my car is still hot!”

He then scanned the code and took two Fragrant Rice Wine Ice Creams. This customer must also be a “habitual offender.” Lu Qin didn’t care anymore. Sometimes, good advice was useless for those determined to overindulge.

Soon after, more customers started buying again, and more of them kept coming. There were even several customers who were so familiar with Lu Qin that they didn’t need to be reminded.

“I’m telling you, you’ve already had eight! Are you sure you want two more Mint Watermelon ones? Aren’t you afraid of getting stomach problems?”

“Nonsense! I’ve only had seven! Don’t worry, I’m healthy. I’ll be fine as long as I don’t eat more than ten!”

Lu Qin was speechless.

An hour later, the male restroom at the food festival was packed. The small shop selling water and drinks had run out of napkins, and the owner was confused!

The most absurd thing was when a customer emerged from the restroom looking pale, but after a moment, he felt fine and went back to queue for more ice cream. Lu Qin looked at him in disbelief. The guy was still holding toilet paper in his hand.

“Should I sprinkle some anti-diarrhea powder on your ice cream?” Lu Qin joked.

……

chapters.title: Chapter 215
chapters.content:
Chapter 215

Other food festival-goers looked on in shock as they saw people holding toilet paper, clutching their stomachs, running to the restroom.

“Hey, what’s going on? Did you guys eat something bad?”

“Lu Qin!”

“Ah! That stall with the most popular ice cream? No way, is it food poisoning?”

“No, it’s just the ice cream… oh! Oh! I’m gonna spray!”

One person rushed to the restroom.

“Does it still have ice cream? Is there something wrong with it?”

A food lover slowly walked by, licking his Fragrant Rice Wine Ice Cream.

“I’ll tell you, there’s something seriously wrong with that ice cream!”

“They put some kind of crazy science and tricks in it?”

“NO NO NO! It’s just that the taste is too good! Those guys must have eaten at least ten!”

“Ten? That’s exaggerated! No wonder they’re spraying everywhere!”

“Not like me. I stopped after six. Nothing wrong with me…”

Before the person could finish, they suddenly felt a rumble in their stomach.

“Holy crap! No way… dude, do you have any paper?”

“Only a used one…”

……

Such an absurd scene unfolded before their eyes, and everyone was utterly shocked. Lu Qin’s ice cream had sold out quickly, but not because it wasn’t delicious—rather, because it was so good that customers just couldn’t stop themselves, leading to more and more “explosive” incidents. This was truly a once-in-a-lifetime situation!

And so, Lu Qin’s ice cream stall quickly sold out. Lu Qin picked up his little one from kindergarten, and his daughter, Little Boss, couldn’t take her eyes off the ice cream machine.

“Daddy, what’s this?”

“Guess?”

Lu Qin smiled.

His little girl’s eyes lit up when she saw some leftover ice cream in the machine.

Her smart little brain spun fast, and she exclaimed, “Daddy! This is for making ice cream!”

“Bingo! Little Boss got it right!”

Her face was filled with excitement, and her mouth went “wow wow wow” in a loop.

“Daddy! This! This! It makes ice cream!”

“That’s right!”

The little one felt like a rainbow appeared at night, it was so beautiful. Ice cream freedom has arrived!

Daddy’s the best!

The little one held Lu Qin’s face and kissed him again and again. As Lu Qin’s daughter, she was the luckiest in the world!

“Daddy, I want ice cream!!”

“Daddy, is this the ice cream you made?”

“Yeah, it’s Red Bean Mugwort flavor. Do you want to try it?”

“Of course I want it!”

The little one had never tasted this flavor before and was excited. Lu Qin had purposely saved a portion of ice cream for her. The deep green color, with red beans sprinkled on top, looked delicious and inviting.

“Wow! Wow! Wow!”

The little one’s eyes sparkled as she exclaimed repeatedly. She stretched her little arms, her face full of “I want it, I want it.”

Lu Qin handed the ice cream to her. Today, she wasn’t supposed to have ice cream, but she had won a “Gastrointestinal Health Tea” from a premium draw yesterday. He planned to make her a cup later to care for her stomach.

The little one held the ice cream with her two small, tender hands, running around happily with a face full of joy. She took a bite, and the wonderful taste spread across her tongue. It was so delicious. This was a taste of ice cream she had never experienced before!

Having eaten so many ice creams, she was an ice cream enthusiast, but Lu Qin’s homemade ice cream completely shattered her expectations.

“Daddy, this ice cream is sooooo delicious!”

She stuck out her little red tongue and kept licking, her eyes squinting into crescent moons!

“Slow down, it’s really cold.”

Lu Qin could only give her one, no more. He moved a small stool for her to sit and eat slowly. As for himself, he finished selling the remaining ice cream. It only took him a few minutes, and the business was so good today that there was hardly anything left. Today’s earnings were a bit higher than yesterday’s.

For the next three days, he would continue setting up his stall at the Lianhua District Food Festival in the afternoon and evening. Boss Lu’s stall didn’t just make a profit, it also captured a lot of customers from Lianhua District.

The food festival ended smoothly, but all the customers remembered Lu Qin’s stall, while the other local food stands in Lianhua District faded into the background.

Lianhua District suffered huge losses, and Qin Hui was very upset. Several customers from Lianhua District even decided to move to An’nan District for permanent residence.

Why? It was all for Lu Qin’s food stall.

Close proximity to the source of good food!

When the news reached Lianhua District’s cultural tourism bureau, the leaders were so upset they nearly “spontaneously combusted,” and spat out blood!

…

On the weekend, Shen Hongda and his wife invited Lu Qin over for dinner. Now that Lu Qin and the wealthy woman had a somewhat subtle relationship, everyone in town knew. So, there was no need to send the little one to visit the woman’s house for the weekend. The whole family would come together!

When Chef Lu arrived, the whole family couldn’t help but drool. The meal was naturally prepared by Lu Qin, with Jiang Qin assisting and learning.

But some things were really hard to learn—not just a matter of talent, but also years of accumulation. Jiang Qin felt a sense of pride welling up in her heart!

Her son-in-law was incredible!

Taking him out would outshine any big family or business circle!

No one would be embarrassed!

The food was almost ready when the strategist Fang Ya arrived, just in time to mooch some food!

Shen Muyan rolled her eyes.

“You with your dog nose?”

Fang Ya put down two bags of fruit and, while changing her slippers, excitedly said, “Ha-ha, my nose is even more sensitive than a dog’s!”

Mao Xue Wang, Spicy Chicken, Mapo Tofu, Garlic Pork, and Fiery Waist Flowers…

One mouth-watering dish after another was placed on the table. The sound of swallowing saliva echoed in the room!

“Honey, is the rice ready? Hurry, I’m starving!”

Shen Hongda was practically drooling!

“Coming, coming!”

Jiang Qin brought the rice pot to the table.

“You guys aren’t hungry, you’re just craving!”

“Both craving and hungry!”

…

After the meal, Fang Ya stuffed herself and went back to her apartment to play games. The little one clung to Lu Qin, asking to watch cartoons, play Gobang, and use small sticks to pick up pieces… Basically, she wouldn’t let him leave. Unknowingly, the night had fallen.

Since it was the weekend, they could sleep in the next day, and the little one didn’t have to go to kindergarten. She could play freely and forget about time.

Shen Muyan finished working from the study and came out, still unaware of what was going on.

She heard Shen Hongda say, “Lu Qin, it’s so late, don’t go back. Stay here and sleep.”

Jiang Qin said, “That’s right, Yaoyao, Grandma will take you to wash up. Lu Qin, you can sleep in Xiaoyan’s room! There are no other rooms left, so you’ll have to suffer tonight!”

Shen Muyan widened her eyes.

“Sleep in my room! What do you mean by ‘suffer’?”

Lu Qin: “???”

This big villa has seven or eight bedrooms, and there are no other rooms left!

chapters.title: Chapter 216
chapters.content:
Chapter 216

No rooms means no rooms.

Jiang Qin took a big bunch of keys and locked all the other bedrooms in the villa. Then she dragged the little one upstairs to sleep.

Shen Muyan’s room was on the third floor, and all the rooms there were locked.

Lu Qin: “……”

Shen Muyan: “……”

They didn’t expect that the little one’s grandmother would give such a big assist. Shen Muyan’s beautiful, cold face didn’t show any expression. She slightly parted her red lips and said, “You’ll sleep on the floor.”

With a smug tone, she left the four words behind and the rich woman went upstairs on her own. Lu Qin helplessly shook his head and followed her upstairs.

The two of them entered the room, one after the other. The luxurious big bed could be used for wrestling, wrestling, or doing push-ups. Shen Muyan walked into the walk-in closet to change clothes, leaving the door open, showing she didn’t treat Lu Qin as an outsider at all.

Lu Qin touched his nose, unsure whether to sit or stand. Shen Muyan, wearing a bathrobe, had her hair tied up and went into the bathroom. Soon, the sound of water splashing came from inside. The rich woman was taking a shower.

She had started showering. The mist filled the room, and her white skin was faintly visible. The space for imagination was too vast, and Lu Qin was starting to lose control.

After half an hour of torment, the rich woman came out in a bathrobe, her hair still wet with a few droplets of water. Her exquisitely beautiful, fair face, with the blush from the shower, looked even more charming and alluring.

Her white, delicate little legs were exposed beneath the bathrobe, elegant, balanced, and beautifully captivating. This was a beautiful scene that only Lu Qin could admire, but the person involved had no luck to enjoy it, as it was too stimulating and went straight to his head.

The rich woman moved gracefully, walking over with a cold but charming face, though her side glance was on Lu Qin’s reaction. Seeing Lu Qin sitting awkwardly, like a fool, she smiled faintly at the corner of her lips.

The rich woman lifted a corner of the blanket, threw the bathrobe onto the windowsill, and slipped into a black, thin, and delicate nightgown. Then she leaned back on the bed and started playing with her phone.

Lu Qin sat at the foot of the bed, unsure of what to do, feeling very awkward. When he swallowed, he realized his throat was already dry.

I’ll go take a shower to escape this battlefield.

The bathroom was filled with fragrance. Not only did it smell of shampoo and shower gel, but there was also the faint, enchanting fragrance of the rich woman’s body.

Lu Qin’s mind was even more distracted.

This big house, and yet, no one was here to open the windows for ventilation!

The moisture was getting trapped in the ceiling and bath cabinet, what if it gets moldy?

A house really can’t do without a man!

Lu Qin: “?”

What’s that sound?

Lu Qin felt a small voice inside his body say the above words. He started to shower. In the shower, there were quite a few bottles of the rich woman’s personal care products. None of them had Chinese characters, they were all in English, Korean, and Japanese.

From washing her hair to washing her feet, none of the bottles were useless. It was no wonder that the rich woman was so delicate, while men just used one bottle for everything.

Men only need a 13-in-1 bottle for shampoo, shower gel, conditioner, toothpaste, mouthwash, eye drops, toilet cleaner, egg whites, sports drinks, engine oil, tempered glass film, and shoe polish.

One bottle does it all, no need for such hassle!

Luckily, Lu Qin was fluent in eight languages, so he could tell which one was shampoo and shower gel.

He didn’t need to look at the others; they weren’t even worth it, he wasn’t an alchemist. After showering, Lu Qin noticed that the rich woman had a lot of towels, each for a different use: one for the head, one for the face, one for the feet, and one for the body…

Lu Qin just picked one at random and wiped his whole body with it. He turned on the ventilation, turned off the light, and went out.

…

After Lu Qin entered the bathroom to shower, the rich woman immediately sent a message to her strategist, Fang Ya. On the surface, she remained calm, but in reality, she was also nervous, not knowing what to say or do.

Shen Muyan: “He’s sleeping in my room tonight.”

Fang Ya, who was playing a game and running a dungeon, saw the message and immediately got excited, hanging up the game.

Her teammates in the dungeon were cursing. “Damn! She dropped out! She’s the healer, how are we supposed to play without healing?!”

Fang Ya: “Is this going to end badly?”

Shen Muyan: “?”

Shen Muyan was slow to react, and when she realized what Fang Ya meant, her cheeks instantly turned red.

Shen Muyan: “Are you trying to kill me?”

Fang Ya: “Hehe! If it were me, I’d have taken him down already, no passive moves, definitely the dominant one. But you, why not go wild for once?”

Shen Muyan: “……”

Shen Muyan was speechless. Fang Ya’s lewd remarks were unbearable. But after Fang Ya said that, Shen Muyan couldn’t help but imagine the scenario and immediately became shy.

Shen Muyan: “It’s not that far yet. Can you give some constructive advice?”

Fang Ya: “Isn’t it better to go all in at once? In your case, cutting through the mess quickly is the best way!”

Shen Muyan: “I’m afraid of scaring him away.”

In fact, Shen Muyan was a bit timid. Talking about tackling Lu Qin and riding on top of him… forget actual action, even thinking about it made her nervous.

Fang Ya rolled her eyes, wetted her finger with saliva, and flipped through a guidebook titled How to Tackle Your Dream Man.

She summarized, “Set the air conditioner to 16 degrees, turn the wind up high, swap to the thinnest blanket, and in half an hour, you’ll be a couple. Uh-uh-uh, then it’s the typical idol drama, staring into each other’s eyes, heartbeats racing, slowly moving closer, and then, tongue battle…”

Fang Ya said this without batting an eye.

Shen Muyan had to bury her face in the blanket after hearing the last part. But after thinking it through, this method seemed pretty good. So, the rich woman started adjusting the air conditioning.

When Lu Qin came out, he shivered.

Why’s it so cold?

He thought it was just because he had just showered, but when he looked at the calm rich woman still playing with her phone, he asked, “Do you have any extra blankets?”

He couldn’t just climb into her bed directly, afraid she would kick him out. He decided to sleep on the floor instead.

“There’s only one blanket.”

The rich woman glanced at Lu Qin and then gently pointed to the wardrobe. Lu Qin walked over, opened the wardrobe, and found only one very thin air conditioning blanket.

Uh…

How could he sleep on the floor with this?

And it’s so cold…

Lu Qin looked around, unsure of what to do. Just then, the rich woman spoke indifferently, “Sleep on the right side.”

The rich woman appeared calm, but her heartbeat was undeniably fast. Lu Qin froze for a moment, looked at the two-meter wide bed, and fell into deep thought.

Well, a single person doesn’t really need such a big bed. Hmm, it’s actually two beds, just pushed together. Since it’s two beds, it’s not that awkward.

Lu Qin took the air conditioning blanket and slept on the right side.

chapters.title: Chapter 217
chapters.content:
Chapter 217

In the bedroom, the air conditioner was set to 16°C, with a wind speed of level three. The sound of the wind was whooshing. After more than ten minutes, the two of them curled up in their own blankets.

The main light was off, leaving only the soft bedside night light. It was time to sleep. The two of them were lying on the same bed, with an invisible “divide” between them, neither of them daring to cross it.

They both thought the other had closed their eyes and fallen asleep. But they both turned over at the same time, their eyes meeting, staring at each other.

Shen Muyan’s long curled eyelashes trembled slightly, her clear, bright eyes cold and distant. Lu Qin looked at her stunningly close face, with skin so delicate it seemed ready to break with a slight touch, and his heartstrings were tugging.

Suddenly, Shen Muyan remembered the scene described by her strategist, Fang Ya — something about slowly getting closer, lips meeting, exchanging tongues…

In a flash, the rich woman’s fair cheeks turned red. Her usually cold face became unexpectedly soft and alluring. It was like magic.

Lu Qin was stunned, looking at her.

Is she hot?

The thought of turning the air conditioner temperature higher disappeared. Wrapping herself tighter in the blanket, Lu Qin spoke, “Let’s sleep, it’s getting late.”

“Mm.”

They both turned over again, facing away from each other and closed their eyes. Both adults, at times, the attraction between them was obvious. They both knew full well what would happen, but when it came time to take that step, they both hesitated.

It might be that their minds had become open, but their actions were still reserved. They both kept their distance and fell asleep in a haze. The room’s temperature remained unchanged.

While sleeping, their pores opened, and they both grew colder as they slept.

Instinctively, their bodies moved closer, seeking warmth. It was natural and harmonious…

The next day, the first rays of sunlight streamed into the room. Lu Qin woke up slowly. His arm was slightly sore and numb. Looking down, Shen Muyan was curled up, her head resting in the crook of his arm, her silky hair spread across his chest.

Her delicate arms wrapped around his waist, one slender hand skillfully rubbing his abs. She was still asleep, lazily and obediently like a Persian cat. Her smooth, delicate legs had entwined with his, like a perfect fit.

This position…

Young Lu Qin was already unsure how long he had been trying to keep his composure. He reached out with his free hand to grab the air conditioner remote, turning the temperature up and reducing the wind speed to avoid catching a cold.

Now…

What to do?

Lu Qin didn’t dare move, afraid to wake the sleeping beauty. This position was undeniably comfortable and wonderful, but it also tested Lu Qin’s patience. One wrong move, and it would be explosive.

…

“Daddy~! Mommy~! Wake up, the sun is up~!”

The little one, who had gone to bed at 9 PM, was up at 6 AM, full of energy. Jiang Qin was in the kitchen making breakfast, and the little one ran to the third floor to find Lu Qin and Shen Muyan.

The sound was so loud that it startled Lu Qin, and Shen Muyan was also woken up. In the chaos, Lu Qin hurriedly pulled his hand out. Just as he was about to get up, his body lost balance. Because their legs were still tangled together, like two serpents.

In a sudden twist of fate, Lu Qin braced himself, landing directly on Shen Muyan’s now-awake, cold beauty.

A hint of awkwardness appeared in Lu Qin’s eyes.

Was this action and position scripted? Why did it happen at this exact moment?

Shen Muyan felt the weight on her stomach and was a little uncomfortable. Her eyebrows furrowed. She even faintly felt the presence of Young Lu Qin.

Her beautiful face instantly turned red.

“You… what do you think you’re doing?”

Taking advantage while she was asleep? That’s too much.

Did she even feel it in her sleep?

Just then.

Click!

The bedroom door was pushed open.

Clop-clop-clop.

The little one ran a few steps, then stopped.

“Mommy and Daddy, what are you doing?”

What does a child know?

She blinked her clear, big eyes.

Shen Muyan and Lu Qin, now fully awake, hurriedly separated and started adjusting the blankets. But they realized there was only one blanket.

The two of them tugged at it, and Lu Qin let go, picking up the other air conditioning blanket that had fallen to the floor. They both sat at the head of the bed, smiling at the little one.

Lu Xiyao: “???”

“Mommy and Daddy, what are you doing?”

“Wrestling.”

Lu Qin suddenly had an idea and said a word that wouldn’t confuse the little one.

“Yaoyao, your mommy and daddy are still sleeping, don’t disturb them!”

Jiang Qin, having noticed that the little one wasn’t in her room or the bathroom, came upstairs to look for her. This little troublemaker really didn’t know when to stop.

When the door opened, the little one had already woken up the “couple.”

“Grandma, Mommy and Daddy aren’t sleeping, they’re wrestling on the bed!” The little one innocently said.

Oh my god!

Seeing Jiang Qin’s strange expression, both Lu Qin and Shen Muyan were frozen in shock. Jiang Qin’s eyes sparkled with amusement. She patted the little one on the head and looked up at Lu Qin and Shen Muyan,

“You two should restrain yourselves a little.”

“Yaoyao, let’s go downstairs for breakfast.”

“Let your mommy and daddy continue… wrestling.”

Jiang Qin was experienced and could imagine how the two had been burning with desire the previous night, surely exhausting each other. Waking up in the morning still not satisfied, and continuing.

Although the young ones had plenty of energy, she couldn’t help but remind them. Lu Qin and Shen Muyan were already mentally fried. The room was so quiet, you could hear a pin drop.

The atmosphere was so awkward, they could probably carve a mansion with their toes.

Lu Qin and Shen Muyan tacitly chose silence, getting up, dressing, and washing up…

When they went downstairs for breakfast, Shen Hongda and Jiang Qin had finished their private conversation. When they saw Lu Qin and Shen Muyan, they smiled knowingly.

“Up already? Come have breakfast.”

The most terrifying misunderstandings are the ones that are impossible to explain. Jiang Qin even peeled two boiled eggs for Lu Qin and poured him a large glass of milk.

Eggs and milk are rich in protein…

Lu Qin ate them all with a stiff neck, already eager to leave, and hurriedly excused himself, claiming he had to go set up the breakfast stall.

After Lu Qin left, Shen Muyan adjusted her emotions and calmly ate her breakfast.

Jiang Qin, smiling, patted the little one’s head.

“Yaoyao, you’re going to have a little brother or sister soon!”

Pfft!

Shen Muyan nearly spit out her milk.

“Mom, what are you saying in front of the little one?”

Shen Muyan was mortified, wanting to find a hole to crawl into. The little one stared for a moment, then excitedly said, “Really? Mommy~! Am I going to be a big sister~?”

chapters.title: Chapter 218
chapters.content:
Chapter 218

Jiang Qin didn’t care.

“I’m telling the truth, didn’t you take any measures?”

Last night was a surprise attack, and it wasn’t even Shen Muyan’s villa. Jiang Qin didn’t believe that in such a sudden situation, they would still bring something like a small umbrella. So, it seems natural that the little one might have a little brother or sister.

“Mom, don’t say such things in front of the child.”

Shen Muyan was about to be driven mad, not knowing the truth but still talking about it, and the worst part was that she couldn’t explain it. It was so frustrating.

Fortunately, Little Lu Xiyao was enjoying her delicious fried egg and didn’t hear the adults talking. After finishing his porridge, Shen Hongda wiped his mouth and said to Jiang Qin, “Alright, don’t say too much about such things. Just keep it in mind, and it’s enough.”

Saying this out loud would be too embarrassing for the younger generation. Shen Hongda understood this. But as he spoke, his brows twitched slightly, clearly indicating he was in a good mood. He had already had two bowls of porridge.

Shen Muyan couldn’t stay any longer, so she grabbed a piece of bread and went to work. Being the CEO was not easy, she had to work even on weekends.

…

Yesterday, when Jiang Qin suddenly stayed at the villa, it disrupted Lu Qin’s routine. By the time he returned to the rented house, it was already 7:30 PM.

Without any notice from Lu Qin, Xiaomi had gone to the market to buy ingredients for the day, based on yesterday’s menu. So, today’s menu was still the same as yesterday’s.

The main dishes were stir-fried, and the three dishes from yesterday were imperial chicken wings, fish-flavored shredded pork, and dry-braised fish. The feedback on the three dishes was great, so there was no problem sticking to the same menu.

Xiaomi had already completed 80-90% of the preparation work. She put the drained rice noodles into plastic baskets and covered them with gauze.

“Boss, you’re back?”

“I went to buy the ingredients today. I didn’t have enough money, and I still owe 432.50 to Cai, the fish seller.”

“Oh, no problem, I’ll transfer the money to him via WeChat.”

Since they were regular customers, Xiaomi could charge the items. Lu Qin took out his phone and greeted Cai, the fish seller, on WeChat. Xiaomi seemed not to bargain.

For the 2.50 leftover, Cai would generally just let it slide. The morning stall was at the usual place, and Lu Qin didn’t bother sending a notice to the group.

The bulletin board had the announcement that if there was no special notice, the stall location would be the same as the previous day. Today, the morning stall sold a lot of kimchi.

In reality, kimchi sales weren’t as good as other foods, as it wasn’t something people could eat every day. It sold well mainly because the customers from Lianhua District, due to the distance, couldn’t come daily. They could only buy some kimchi and pickled chicken feet to keep in the fridge for a few days, satisfying their cravings until the next trip to Annan District.

In the afternoon, when setting up the stall, Lu Qin noticed his phone battery was low, so he didn’t open the stall map app and just picked an old place.

At Huaguo Mountain Park, the weather was sunny, perfect for going outside. It was the weekend, so more people were out strolling than usual.

Upon arriving at the park, Lu Qin felt something was odd. The crowd outside the park was dense, pointing and even taking out their phones to take pictures.

Why weren’t they going inside to stroll?

Lu Qin slowly drove the food cart into the park.

“Boss, it looks like they are filming inside.”

Xiaomi, looking through the window, saw the camera in the distance. Lu Qin slowly stopped the car, and two staff members from Huaguo Mountain drove up in a patrol car.

“Sorry, sir, the park is being used by a film crew today. You can’t set up your stall inside.”

So they were filming.

There was nothing to be done. Lu Qin was about to find another spot when a man in a cap and glasses jogged over.

“Wait, wait! Isn’t this a perfect prop?”

“Hello, I’m Chen Dong, the assistant director of Happy Sunshine TV series.”

Chen Dong stopped Lu Qin.

“Hello, can we use your food cart as a prop for the filming? We need a food stall for a street background in a few scenes.”

Lu Qin was stunned for a moment, not expecting the film crew to want his food cart.

“Sorry, I still need to operate the stall. I don’t think I can do that.”

Lu Qin refused, he was there to do business.

“Don’t worry, sir, we’ll pay you. It won’t take more than half a day to finish filming a few scenes, and I’ll pay you for a full day’s earnings, how about that?”

“You must be working hard at the stall, dealing with the sun and wind. Now you just need to serve as a background. When there’s no camera, you can rest. How does that sound?”

Chen Dong was trying hard to convince Lu Qin. He was struggling to find a prop food cart, and this opportunity was too good to pass up.

Lu Qin thought for a moment and asked, “Really? You’ll pay me a full day’s earnings?”

“Of course! We’re a big film crew, we won’t cheat you. Also, you might get to see some stars! If you want any autographs or photos, I can arrange that!”

“I still have a lot of ingredients in my cart. Those ingredients are mine, right? I need to take them back afterward.”

Chen Dong nodded.

“We only need your food cart as the background. Occasionally, we might need to sell some snacks to the characters, but we won’t use your ingredients.”

Chen Dong took a glance at the food cart, which was full of large and small boxes of ingredients.

“You sell fried rice noodles? The crew might want to order a few portions for the staff, and we can pay extra for that. Is that okay?”

Chen Dong asked, suggesting that the fried rice noodles could be ordered for the crew. As for the actors, well, the little-known actors were very picky about food and wouldn’t eat the box lunch provided by the crew. They would order food from a restaurant.

Fried rice noodles were a different story.

“If the conditions are like this, then no problem, I agree.”

Lu Qin nodded. If it was like this, it was quite profitable. And with the sealed fresh-keeping box, some of the ingredients wouldn’t spoil.

Chen Dong saw that Lu Qin agreed and clapped his hands, instructing a staff member to show Lu Qin where to park. There was also Xiaomi in the cart, so Lu Qin told her to drive his M7 back and clean the kitchen, and prepare the kimchi for pickling.

Lu Qin could also have Boss Zhao deliver a batch of disposable food containers for Xiaomi to collect. Xiaomi left, and Lu Qin set up the food cart just like usual. After that, there wasn’t much else to do.

The crew members were busy around, while Lu Qin sat alone in the cart, enjoying the breeze from the fan, drinking iced mung bean soup, and scrolling through his phone.

Once the scene setup was complete, each department began preparing for filming. Not far away, a few vans were parked at the foot of Huaguo Mountain, and the main actors got out of the vehicles. At that moment, the crowd of onlookers outside caused a stir.

chapters.title: Chapter 219
chapters.content:
Chapter 219

“Look, it’s the lead actress Shu Man’er, just as beautiful as on TV!”

“I like the male lead, Wu Chen, he’s a talented young actor!”

“Male second, Peng Kai, is handsome too. I hope he keeps acting and hones his skills to become a lead actor soon!”

“Wow! There’s also a familiar old actor, but I can’t remember his name!”

“This drama has so many stars, it should be really good!”

…

The crowd of onlookers pulled out their phones, opened the zoom lens, and started taking photos. Among them, a few paparazzi and reporters were also present.

Sitting in the food cart, Lu Qin curiously looked over to see what the stars on TV looked like in real life. After a few glances, he stopped looking.

Hmm, so celebrities are just like regular people, with two eyes, a nose, and a mouth, nothing special.

He didn’t follow celebrities, so naturally, he didn’t recognize any of them, and he didn’t even find them familiar. There was an old actor he might have seen in a drama, but he didn’t have a strong impression.

Lu Qin usually watched cartoons with the little one on TV and had never watched an entire drama. The actors were all made up, and they were about to start filming.

A staff member came over and reminded Lu Qin to act as he normally would at the stall and not to deliberately look at the camera. Lu Qin nodded, it was easy enough.

He saw Assistant Director Chen Dong coordinate with the other departments before doing a final check.

“All departments are ready…”

Chen Dong’s words were interrupted by the executive director, Wen Zhiyong, from behind the monitor.

“Assistant Director, something’s not right…”

“What’s wrong?”

Chen Dong looked around but didn’t see anything.

Wen Zhiyong pointed to Lu Qin in the food cart and said, “This little boss is too handsome, don’t you think? If you didn’t know, you’d think…”

Wen Zhiyong didn’t finish his sentence, but his point was clear – with his sharp features, broad brows, and bright eyes, even without makeup, he looked like the leading man.

It was surprising that he was working at a food stall and not relying on his looks to make a living. The crew looked over at Lu Qin after Wen Zhiyong pointed him out.

At first, they hadn’t paid much attention to him, but now they realized that this food cart owner was exceptionally good-looking. Some even compared his looks with male second Peng Kai’s. Honestly, Lu Qin was more attractive.

Peng Kai was a typical fresh-faced young actor, the type you see everywhere, and there was a certain exhaustion with that kind of look. He was also wearing makeup, with several layers of foundation, making his skin look unnaturally white.

On the other hand, Lu Qin was overly handsome, with a gentle and refined aura. He was not only good-looking but had a charm that wouldn’t wear off with time.

He was perfect for an idol role, but unfortunately, he couldn’t act, or else Peng Kai’s spot as male second might have been taken. The lead actress, Shu Man’er, saw Lu Qin and her eyes lit up.

Male lead Wu Chen felt a bit envious of Lu Qin’s looks. After all, he was a talented actor, but if he had a bit more idol appeal, he’d be perfect. Lu Qin felt a bit frustrated seeing everyone staring at him.

Weren’t they the ones who asked me to be the background? Why is the problem suddenly on me?

Chen Dong quickly ran over and said to Lu Qin, “Sorry, Mr. Lu, you’re just too handsome! Could you please go sit to the side and rest? We need to borrow your work clothes for another staff member to play the stall owner.”

Lu Qin was stunned for a moment.

But okay, since it’s because I’m too handsome, I’ll let it slide.

With a helpless sigh, Lu Qin walked out, took off his work clothes, and sat on a folding chair nearby to watch the filming. Now, he didn’t have to exert any effort at all, just earning money effortlessly. Not bad at all.

Filming began.

The actors took their places.

Then came the familiar sounds of “A-Action” and “Cut.”

Lu Qin, watching from the side, couldn’t help but think, Is this for real?

In the third scene, there was a small plot where the male lead had to buy a portion of fried rice noodles from a street vendor. The staff member playing the stall owner was having trouble.

“I don’t know how to make fried rice noodles.”

“Try it.”

“Just pretend.”

At this moment, Lu Qin walked over to Assistant Director Chen Dong and reminded him, “Director, you need to charge for the ingredients, right? Oil and seasoning are free, but the noodles should be priced.”

Chen Dong’s mouth twitched.

“Okay, okay, Mr. Lu, we won’t forget.”

He understood; street vendors usually operated on small margins, so Lu Qin’s concern was valid.

“Cut!”

“How did you fling the noodles out? Control the strength!”

…

“Cut!”

“How much soy sauce are you putting? The noodles are as black as the bottom of the wok! Would you even dare eat this?”

“Cut!”

Director Wen was frustrated with a staff member playing a minor role.

“How can making fried noodles be this hard?”

But he couldn’t change the actor, since several shots from earlier had featured the food stall, and replacing the actor would mean reshooting, which was too much trouble.

“Forget it, forget it. Let’s focus on the close-ups of the hand movements and then cut to the next scene.”

Chen Dong immediately went to find Lu Qin and asked him to fry a portion of noodles. It had been agreed earlier that Lu Qin would help with the cooking process.

“Alright.”

Lu Qin put his phone in his pocket and stood up. He didn’t want his fried noodles to be ruined by the crew anymore.

“The photographer will only film the hands.”

If they filmed his face or body, it would be obvious that the actor and Lu Qin didn’t match – the stall owner was an older man, and Lu Qin was a young guy with a completely different build.

Lu Qin walked to the cart, tidied up the “mess,” and demonstrated what it truly meant to “fry rice noodles.”

As soon as the wok started sizzling, a delicious aroma filled the air, making the people nearby salivate. It smelled amazing!

Especially male lead Wu Chen, who had been filming for most of the day and was getting hungry. The thought of eating while acting excited him.

“Okay, cut!”

The shot of Lu Qin’s cooking was finished, and Director Wen gave a thumbs-up, praising, “Mr. Lu, you’re amazing! The way you fried the noodles was so professional, honestly, your entire noodle-frying sequence almost stole the show! Haha!”

With those words, the crew all looked at Lu Qin. Director Wen rarely praised anyone, always quick to criticize, even the lead actors. But this time, he praised an extra. It was rare to see.

In the director’s monitor, every one of Lu Qin’s movements was detailed and smooth, and the close-up shot could rival that of a culinary show.

After Lu Qin left the cart, the staff member put on the work clothes again, and a wide shot was taken. Then, it was time for male lead Wu Chen’s scene.

He had to eat the fried noodles while delivering his lines.

“Wu Chen, are you ready?”

“Ready, director.”

“Props team?”

“Ready.”

“Good, action!”

Wu Chen had already memorized his lines and was confident about the scene. He picked up his chopsticks and took a bite of the fried noodles.

chapters.title: Chapter 220
chapters.content:
Chapter 220

Under the camera, Wu Chen was trying to get into character while eating the fried noodles. As the first bite of fried noodles entered his mouth, Wu Chen’s eyes lit up, and he almost couldn’t hold back his exclamation.

These… these fried noodles are just too delicious!!

The chewy, flavorful rice noodles in his mouth were filled with an irresistible aroma, and Wu Chen felt his taste buds suddenly come alive!

No exaggeration, these fried noodles were so good it almost felt like his soul was leaving his body!

One more bite!

This is so damn good!!

A third bite!

I must have another bite!

…

Wu Chen couldn’t stop himself from savoring the noodles.

“Click click click!”

Director Wen furrowed his brows.

“Wu Chen, what’s going on? You’re just eating, where’s your line?”

“This is such a simple scene, and you messed it up? Are you playing around?”

Wu Chen, who had been lost in the ecstasy of eating noodles, was snapped back to reality by Director Wen’s shout.

“Ah! Director Wen, sorry, sorry, I’ll do it again!”

Director Wen shot Wu Chen a glare, crossed his legs, and didn’t say anything else.

Wu Chen, noticing the fried noodles were half-eaten, grabbed his chopsticks and fluffed the remaining noodles to make it look like a full serving.

He calmed himself down and swallowed.

He mentally reminded himself.

Focus, focus.

No more mistakes!

Director Wen: “321, prepare! Action!”

Wu Chen started eating the noodles.

Bite after bite.

Remember your lines, remember your lines!

Wu Chen had a small voice inside him calling.

But at the same time, another voice was yelling, “Eat the noodles, one more bite, they’re so delicious!”

In the end, the second voice won. The fried noodles were quickly finished!

“Damn! Click click click !”

Director Wen’s face darkened.

“Wu Chen, have you never eaten fried noodles before? You’re just eating, not saying your lines!”

“This is such an easy scene, and you’ve messed it up twice, what’s going on? Showing off your celebrity status? Do you think you’re a big shot now?”

“Do you even want to keep acting?”

Director Wen was furious.

The set went quiet. Everyone turned to look at Wu Chen. They were all wondering what had happened to this normally excellent actor.

Could it be that he was just hungry?

It was just a portion of fried rice noodles, it couldn’t be that bad, right?

Wu Chen looked at the empty food container with shame, unable to resist again!

He looked apologetically at Director Wen, having never messed up like this before.

“Director Wen, it’s my fault, I’m sorry to everyone! I’m really sorry!”

“It’s not your fault, is it my fault then?”

Director Wen, seeing Wu Chen’s sincere attitude, waved his hand.

“Let’s do it again.”

He gave him a third chance.

Assistant Director Chen Dong noticed that Wu Chen had already finished the fried noodles, and it seemed like he had eaten them clean. He couldn’t help but twitch his mouth and helplessly went to Lu Qin to ask him to fry another portion.

There was no other choice, so Lu Qin went over and fried a new portion. The fresh serving of fried noodles was placed in Wu Chen’s hands, the golden noodles mixed with ham, lean meat, and eggs, continuously stimulating Wu Chen’s taste buds.

Wu Chen couldn’t help but swallow and felt unable to resist. It smelled so good.

How on earth were these noodles cooked? The wok’s fragrance wafted out, tempting Wu Chen’s cravings to dance with joy.

Some things were beyond Wu Chen’s control.

Meanwhile, Director Wen impatiently called, “Actors in place, prepare 321, Action!”

Wu Chen composed himself, ready to eat the noodles again. After two bites, Wu Chen once again forgot to say his lines, mindlessly savoring the fried noodles.

Director Wen, unable to hold it in any longer, shouted from the sidelines.

“Wu Chen, your lines! Your lines!”

Wu Chen, chewing on the fried noodles, opened his mouth and immediately exclaimed, “Mmm… delicious!”

“…”

“Click click click!”

Director Wen couldn’t take it anymore. He quickly stood up from his chair, grabbed his script, and walked over in a hurry.

“Wu Chen!!!”

“Do you realize you’re wasting the entire crew’s time? The losses will be deducted from your pay!”

Director Wen pointed at Wu Chen’s nose and yelled. The other actors watched the drama unfold, with some veteran actors shaking their heads, lamenting how unprofessional today’s young actors were.

Wu Chen broke into a cold sweat.

Damn, why is this scene about eating so difficult?

Suddenly, an idea struck him, and he explained to Director Wen.

“Director Wen, it’s not my fault, it’s this fried noodles!!”

Director Wen: “?”

Chen Dong: “??”

The crew members: “???”

Lu Qin: “????”

The father of Luoshen stayed silent, while Zhen Ji’s father looked speechless.

“Why does the fried noodles even matter?”

But everyone still looked at Lu Qin in confusion.

Lu Qin thought to himself, I kindly provided a prop, and now you’re blaming my fried noodles for your bad acting!

Are you blaming the Earth’s gravity for your inability to poop?

At this point, even the fried noodles seemed to need a disclaimer–”I should have burned in the pot earlier.”

Director Wen was fuming and snatched the fried noodles from Wu Chen’s hand.

“Ha, you think I’ll believe such a weak excuse?”

Wu Chen desperately tried to explain, “Really, Director Wen, you have to believe me! These fried noodles really have a problem!”

“I believe your nonsense!”

One of the veteran actors, Zhai Lin, couldn’t stand it anymore. Although many viewers might not recognize his name, some of the characters he played had left a deep impression. He usually couldn’t stand these clueless young actors.

Not only were they unprofessional, but now they were blaming the props too. He should take them to a class on “acting with props”!
